programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic accident after a man runs his truck through a wall. An undercover officer poses as a “john” and later a vehicle is stopped due to a missing license plate.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect on a stolen motorcycle is apprehended with the assistance of the K-9 unit. An Officer responds to a domestic disturbance call after a woman "accidentally" stabs her boyfriend. A hazardous meth lab is busted.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A drunk driver rams into a pursuing police car. A man on a bike flees an area known for drug activity on a bike. A sniffling man attempts to hide a baggie with narcotics under his shirt.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue a motorcyclist driving erratically. Deputies find broken drug paraphernalia in a car when conducting a traffic stop. A man who beat up his girlfriend hides from officers in an attic.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people while scanning train tracks. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An elderly woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles on the side of the road.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are called to a burglary at a warehouse housing expensive items. Police are called to the scene of a threatening man with a knife. Officers thwart an attempted suicide during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies confront a man holding a knife to his roommate’s neck over a prior argument. A suspect runs from Deputies on a warrant charge. Suspected robbers are pulled over by Deputies.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A woman tells Officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at Officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: The victim of a home invasion was held at gunpoint. A man in a wheelchair is in a stand-off with campus police. Officers respond to a call about a knife-wielding assailant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A belligerent gun-toting man doesn't take too well to some harsh parental criticism. A bike rider tries to outpace a policeman then pretends to be someone else. Officers try to coax a rattled hit-and-run driver into coming clean.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An officer wrestles a squirrely meth user who thinks he’s the Incredible Hulk. Cops catch a drug-carrying sprinter when he runs out of gas. A belligerent suspect doesn’t take kindly to having his socks removed.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A high-speed chase ends when the suspect plays chicken with a concrete pole. An emotional man just wants the cops to give him a little kiss. A melee breaks out when a woman seizes her beau's cell phone.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A chase becomes a flash flood when a fleeing driver runs into a fire hydrant. An insolent domestic violence suspect claims his girlfriend is a habitual 9-1-1 caller. Officers recover a cornucopia of contraband from a gun-toting couple.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: The K-9 unit responds when a gunman takes to the rooftops. A drug exchange goes awry when the dealer tries to ditch his stash. A pickup-driving drunk tries to play it off when he smashes his neighbor's parked car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A car thief leads police on a high-speed chase until officers pit his vehicle to end the pursuit. Cops cool off a baby and search for the man who left him in a car. Potty-mouthed witnesses inform officers that their friend has been stabbed in the chest.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect races through the neighborhood after his scooter can’t outrun police. Cops discover a drugged, incoherent wild man lying in the bushes. Officers try to make peace between neighbors with pit bull problems.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A cyclist gets booked for trying to split when officers pull him over for a traffic violation. Two brothers struggle to explain why they took off in their truck when they saw the cops. A man takes a swing at his sister because she refuses to mow the lawn.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A homeless man hides from deputies in the closet of an empty house. Officers called to a shooting find a man covered in blood. Deputies arrive to a domestic disturbance to find two brothers fighting over a pair of sandals.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man wanted in connection with a family violence call. Detectives are called to a dispute between neighbors over an unleashed dog. Officers stop a suspect and find paperwork containing dozens of others Social Security numbers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A deputy jumps into a waterway to arrest a fleeing suspect. Officers respond to roommates in an argument. Officers are called after a group of women are attacked.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: The suspect of a carjacking tells an Officer that he would rather go to jail than face the wrath of his mother. An Officer investigates a domestic call involving a husband, wife and a lamp. A slow speed pursuit ensues and the suspects are booked for felony, eluding, and drugs.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he’s just trying to return the vehicle to a friend. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A driver takes several units on a reckless journey driving on the wrong side of the highway. Officers set up a reverse sting operation to capture a suspected drug dealer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A carjacking results in a chase and a flipped vehicle. Suspects crash a truck after attempting to steal beer. A man attempts to swallow his drugs during a bust.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked. A woman asks for officers to help her rescue cats from a trailer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn. A father threatens his daughter and her boyfriend with a knife.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot. An arrest is made after a couple leaving a known drug house is pulled over and questioned.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect leads police on an extended pursuit throughout New Orleans. When he’s flipped off by his neighbors, a man responds by firing a gun. Police pull over a Porsche and discover it’s stolen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects who were believed to have been involved in a robbery. Police attend to a man who has injected a concerning amount of methamphetamine. Officers break up a fight in progress involving two men outside a convenience store.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers attempt to detain undocumented people crosssing the border. Border patrol discovers a driver with a load of drugs in his car. Officers check passports and a suspicious-looking laptop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are called when a disturbed naked man covered in blood is spotted in a park. Officers find a nude couple in a U-Haul truck. A traffic stop over a minor violation turns into a dangerous pursuit.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers engage in a car chase when they spot a possible robbery suspect. A man nicknamed “Danger” is tasered after assaulting several girls. Suspects bail from a vehicle and hide under a porch.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect selling narcotics takes off on foot. A bank robber leaves his wallet in an abandoned money bag. Multiple domestic violence calls end in arrests

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are called when two intoxicated suspects decide to have some fun and vandalize a fence. Undercover officers set up a narcotics sting at a hotel. A man is found lying naked in a parking lot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claims that they didn’t know the car they are driving is stolen. Occupants of a vehicle claim that all of the contraband found in their car is medical equipment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Men seeking the services of a prostitute are arrested during a sting operation. New Jersey Police investigate a potential organized attack on a female suspect. Locals detain a man after he’s caught burglarizing property in the area.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Instead of facing the music, a suspect flees from officers down an embankment. A suspect takes a walk through the neighborhood with a BB gun. A innocent pedestrian gets more than she bargained for when she’s hit in a two vehicle collision.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to flee when officers tell him they will search him. Two men get in a fight over window installation. A hotel room is filled like a clown car with multiple suspects.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: I Won't Be There for You
programme.desc: A suspect foolishly tries to elude police in a bright yellow sports car. Roommates aren’t always there for each other when police are called to break up a fight. No one in a stopped vehicle wants to admit to ownership of contraband.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect runs from an illegal gambling game claiming shots were fired. A man is caught trespassing on school grounds. A male driver wearing a halter top is pulled over for a minor traffic violation.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers respond after two men kick in a woman's door. Three suspects attempt to steal a bicycle in an alley. An officer arrests a husband for domestic abuse.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A couple flees a routine traffic stop. An intoxicated woman climbs a tree. Construction workers are pulled over for a hand-to-hand transaction.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man attacking a woman is tackled by an officer. A vehicle is pulled over for a drug deal in progress. A woman smashes a car window with a pipe in a fit of road rage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A woman claims a man abused her then put a curse on her. Police arrest a man for having illegal drugs on him. An elderly woman locks herself in the restroom at a bank.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers search for a runaway suspect with a weapons charge. A man admits to having a large number of drugs during a traffic stop. Officers respond to a man with a gun in an alley.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: When approached by police, a suspect decides to take his shirt off and taunt the officers. Twin sisters ask for help when their third sister is threated by her boyfriend. An intoxicated suspect crashes his wife’s car into a light pole.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are called to remove a man sleeping in a parking spot at Wal-Mart. A free-spirited couple takes their relationship to their front lawn. A resident brings a knife to a meeting with his building property manager.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An Officer attempts to pull over a car which leads to a high speed pursuit. An Officer encounters an apartment fire. A man is hit by a vehicle in a trailer park.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle that struck a police car. Two men deny the lawnmower in their truck is stolen. Deputies are called when a mother attempts to run her daughter over.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers recover a small bag of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.title: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans

programme.desc: A writer (Dale Evans) of cowboy novels saves herself and a border agent (Roy Rogers) with a trick from her latest book.

programme.desc: A gunslinger a dance-hall girl and drifters enter Indian country.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a baffling marital spat involving a man, his wife, and her untrustworthy yoga instructor. Then, Sonia and Lyndah hit the fashion district to repossess a van from a designer who's way ahead of the curve in terms of the fashion world, but way behind on her payments. And finally, Matt and Froy spoil spirits when they head to a carwash to reclaim a vehicle from a group of vicious, scantily-clad sorority girls.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia attempt to repossess a car from a group of cleaver-wielding short-order cooks with a taste for violence. Then, it's trouble in paradise as Matt and Froy take on the task of reclaiming a beach-scene-on-wheels filled with irate models. And finally, Sonia and Matt find themselves outmatched by a well-armed street gang and its charismatic leader.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.sub-title: Horse Semen & the Rolls Royce Golf Cart
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia head out to the farm to repossess a truck from an entitled equestrian who would rather die than let the repo team get their hands on what's in the back. Then, Lou and Sonia stumble into the middle of a prolonged business dispute between a flower lady and her displeased client. And finally, Sonia and Froy hit the links to reclaim a high-end Rolls Royce golf cart from a snob who thinks he's too good to pay his bills.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Matt inadvertently become pawns in an elaborate and misguided lesson perpetrated by a cheating husband upon his mistress. Then, Matt and Lou attempt to take a vehicle away from a debtor who is so drunk he doesn't remember agreeing to give his car away voluntarily. And, Froy and Sonia try to take a limousine away from its shotgun-wielding driver and his two suspiciously-dressed passengers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah reclaim a riding mower from a housewife and her grab-happy husband. Then, Sonia and Matt head out on a scorcher of an afternoon for a repossession. Will they be able to beat both the heat and a pair of geriatric debtors? And, Sonia and Lyndah are left without words when they see the dark and embarrassing secret held in the backseat of a debtor's unpaid vehicle.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Will a frying pan-wielding housewife stop Lou and Sonia from getting their car? Plus, a repo involving a truck filled with black market contraband goes horrifyingly wrong for Matt and Froy.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia try to repossess a high-end Corvette from a high-strung librarian. Then, it's some serious sibling rivalry when Matt and Froy come to take a van away from a pair of housepainter brothers. Finally, Lou and Matt get knocked for a loop by a sub-professional baseball team who don't want to lose their bus.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: It's payback time when Lou, Matt, and Froy stake out the baseball bus that got away and this time, they've got a foolproof plan. Lou, Matt, and Froy head to a late-night construction site to repossess an enormous crane. And, Sonia and Froy face their worst nightmare when a gang of bikers follows them back to the office.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians who don't want to give up their car. Froy and Sonia try to take a vehicle from the world's most volatile couple. Plus, Lou and Froy wind up in unknown territory when they take an order to repossess from a squad of wannabe backyard wrestlers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything. When Matt, Froy, and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong, the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car. Then, it's Matt and Froy's big repo. Having left the company to start their own, they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Lou's cousin Rob drive out to a used car lot to pick up a few cars, but the owner has been hurt by the economy and now he's ready to do the hurting.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel when a disgruntled wife reveals that she stopped payment on her car because of her cheating husband. And finally, a debtor is nowhere to be found when Lou, Lyndah, and Rob head out to a seemingly quiet neighborhood. The silence is broken when the debtor finally shows up in another vehicle with bang!

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repo's they've ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers. Then, Lou, Sonia, and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted to run on biodiesel. And finally, Matt and Froy can't seem to get a word in edgewise when they encounter a shrieking girl and her biker boyfriend who claim their Mercedes was paid in full. Little do our guys know that she was right all along.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees. Then, Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police with claims of some inappropriate behavior. Finally, the whole Pizarro family heads to an illegal street race to get their just desserts from the man who had previously hit Lyndah with his truck, but at what cost does revenge come?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset, or is somebody going to end up locked in a Mexican prison?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison, Matt is on the warpath, and somebody needs to pay. Is this just the end of their business, or is it also the end of their friendship? Then, Lou and Sonia get an order for a typical vehicle repossession. There's only one problem: it belongs to somebody who is like family to them.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The repo team is back! On the premiere episode of the summer season of Operation Repo, Lou, Matt, Sonia, Froy, and Lyndah are back together and better than ever...although a secret meeting suggests trouble in paradise. This week, the team confronts a shady import/export warehouse filled with unpaid-for cars, a pair of reckless rodeo gals, and a cunning team of car thieves who don't even think twice before running off with the team's truck.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After recovering their stolen truck, the reunited repo team is on pins and needles to hold their shaky alliance together.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career. First, the team repossesses a truck from a pair of larger-than-life debtors with a passion for exotic sports, then they grapple with a gaggle of drunken partiers who don't want to give up their tricked-out bus, and, Lou and Matt track a debtor to a junkyard.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The destruction of the repo team's truck has left the future of the company in the balance, but Matt's got a trick up his sleeve that might keep them afloat. Lou and Sonia head to a dark alley to take a van away from a pair of libidinous teens with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy come face to face with the world's most ornery baker and come away a little worse for wear, and Matt and Froy get in way over their heads when they attempt a repo at a high-octane truck racing track.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Now that Lou has accepted Matt's offer to buy into the company, the team is back in action, but there are still some unanswered questions. Sonia, Lyndah, and Froy interrupt a rich kid's brunch party to take away his ride, Matt and Lyndah attempt to repo an unusual vehicle from a man who thinks he's Uncle Sam, and Lou and Matt are in a losing match with an unruly gang of jacked-up rugby players.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Armed with the belief that he is now co-owner of the business, Matt starts making some big business calls - is this the beginning of a new chapter for the team, or the beginning of its undoing?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The confusion over Lou's new business relationship with Matt continues to mount. Matt and Froy find themselves in a nice neighborhood on a mission to repossess a security car from the world's most bumbling guards, Sonia, Lyndah, and Matt hit the dock in an effort to reclaim an extremely expensive racing boat from its extremely offensive owner, and Lou, Froy, and Matt go on a mission to the backwoods to snag a total of five cars away from a group of misguided daredevil teenagers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The repo team's new truck finally arrives, and with it, a new chapter in the building feud between Team Lou and Team Matt.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Froy is seriously injured on a routine repo, the building confrontation between Lou and Matt continues to escalate.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou's new business relationship with Matt starts to unravel when a botched job puts a serious strain on the company.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Tensions between Lou and Matt continue to boil when Matt enlists his daughter's aid on another job.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: A new rift between Matt and the rest of the crew puts the fate of the team in question.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this no-holds-barred season finale, Matt and Lou have their final confrontation and the team loses a member. Sonia and Lyndah head out with Ashley to repossess a hang-glider in what might turn out to be the last job the three do together, Matt, Sonia, and Lyndah confront a team of shady astronomers who don't want to give up their van, and when Froy, Matt, and Sonia take on a risky job on the bad side of town, bullets fly, and the life of one of the team hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repo's brand new season, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn. The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies, Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle, and Lou, Froy, and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia's recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor. Sonia and Matt sneak onto a big studio lot to repossess a trailer, but there's a big surprise in store when it turns out Matt and the movie's star have a checkered history, Lou and Sonia interrupt a knitting circle to take a car from a booze-soaked craft enthusiast, and Matt and Froy head out to wine country for a disastrous run-in with a group of debtors who have sworn an oath of silence.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia snaps and puts herself on the business end of a knife and the gangbanger wielding it. Froy and Sonia wind up in the middle of a relationship dispute with an absent-minded professor who's got too many cars and too many girlfriends, Matt and Froy confront a debtor with a tiny motorcycle and an enormous mean streak, and Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in the middle of a gang dispute gone horribly awry.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet: one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist. Lyndah and Froy head to the Hollywood Hills to find a luxury sedan.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah find themselves surrounded by a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car, Lou and Sonia get lost in translation when they're forced to contend with a pair of Russian movers and their yuppie lawyer clients, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are in a battle of the scams when they try to trick a group of con artists into giving up their vehicle.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team's work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences. Sonia and Froy drive to the country to repo a tractor and are forced to confront a group of irate corporate hayriders, Lou and Sonia wrangle with a confused lady who is missing both her car and her sense of decency, and Matt and Sonia get into a Mexican standoff with a wealthy divorcee, his daughter, and her rageaholic boyfriend.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy crash the meeting of a fraternal lodge to ask for a car, but instead they get an angry old man with a rifle. Froy and Matt go on a repo that turns into a battle royale.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy interrupt a debtor and two maids who are getting hands-on with their job. A confrontation with construction workers goes bad, and somebody's vehicle will get destroyed.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia try to repossess a car from a yuppie with a flair for the arts and for mayhem, Sonia, Matt, and Froy reclaim some unusual equipment from an overgrown hippie with some long hair and a short temper, and Matt and Sonia interrupt a house party to ask for a vehicle, but soon find themselves fighting for their lives against a troupe of enraged fire dancers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy show off their best moves against a team of dance instructors who will stop at nothing to hold onto their car. Matt and Sonia repossess a vehicle from a woman with the world's most vindictive boyfriend. Lou and Froy match muscle, wits with a gang of vicious roadies.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia are caught in a desperate situation when the owner of their target car is struck by a heart attack. Plus, a repo becomes violent under the watchful eye of the finance company.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou find themselves in the middle of nowhere in a tooth-and-nail fight with a trio of nerdy stargazers, Froy and Sonia find a cooperative old man to be a hassle after agreeing to let him get his stuff out of his cluttered car, and Lou and Matt go on a repo to interrupt a shady car sale and find themselves caught in the middle of an elaborate police sting operation.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia are overwhelmed by a swarm of cheerleaders; Matt and Froy interrupt a father and son bonding session gone wrong; the team heads to the raceway to prove they still have what it takes.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo an airplane, but Froy finds himself in handcuffs when Lou takes off. Matt joins Sonia on a repo from a pole dancing studio, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy repo a car from a girl whose roommate has been keeping two very big secrets. Sonia and Froy's repo from a creepy husband reveals some incriminating evidence to his wife, and when Lou and Sonia can't locate their target car, Lou comes up with a master plan that requires some back-up

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While attempting a repo of a "green energy" bio-diesel vehicle, Froy's (Froylan Tercero) lack of knowledge of the vehicle's specialized fuel system sets the bus ablaze... and when his error causes it to explode, he and Matt (Matt Burch) abandon builders/owners Mickie (Michael Q. Schmidt) and Joey (Gino Calabro) in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift, but a language barrier causes chaos. Matt and Froy are in danger when Froy refuses to call the cops on a gun-wielding debtor.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: With the pressure of Froy's legal problems mounting, the team does everything they can to convince him to hire a lawyer. Froy and Matt confront a misogynist frat boy with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy wrangle with a squadron of costumed rally racers, and Lou, Matt, and Froy get the surprise of a lifetime when they're faced with a truck-full of vicious gangsters.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret. And finally, the team's attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer about his warrant in Texas, he considers taking matters into his own hands. Lou and Froy bust some slick moves in an attempt to wrangle a car from a debtor who is prepared to battle. Then, when one woman behaves like a child, Matt puts her in timeout, but worries he may have gone too far. And finally, Lou, Matt, and Froy take on an jealous husband with deadly aim.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froy's name, but things take a turn for the worse and Froy finds himself in more trouble than he can handle. Back in LA, Lou and Lyndah repo a car from a deceptive charity worker, and Lou is left to protect the girls from two knife wielding debtors who will go to any lengths to keep their vehicles.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When a debtor and his friends resort to baseball bats, chaos erupts, and Lou, Lyndah and Sonia fight not only with them, but also with each other. Down in Texas, Matt and Froy wait to clear up Froy's warrant and get in way over their heads working for a local repo team. Meanwhile, Lou decides to re-hire Frankie despite Sonia and Lyndah's objections, but first Lou wants to see how Frankie fares when faced with the temptation in the form of strippers and alcohol.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Down in Texas, Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer, but their repo turns disastrous when an innocent bystander gets showered in concrete. In LA, Frankie takes the reins with an alcoholic debtor, and Lou and Sonia deal with a diva who pushes Sonia to her breaking point.

Paayal
programme.desc: Shantidevi's daughter elopes with a city-bred man when Shantidevi refuses to give consent to their marriage. Years later, a man meets Shantidevi to inform her that her daughter and son-in-law have died, leaving behind their daughter named Paayal.

programme.title: Tango Charlie
programme.desc: Tarun, a BSF officer, along with his battalion gets deployed to Kargil when a war between India and Pakistan breaks out. This is where Tarun faces the life-threatening challenge.

programme.title: Kunwara
programme.desc: Raju and Urmila fall for each other in New Zealand and promise to meet in India. On his journey in India, Raju meets pregnant Sharmila. To help her, Raju meets her family as her husband and realises that Sharmila is none other than Urmaila’s sister.

programme.title: Hum Hain Rahi Pyar Ke
programme.desc: Rahul is heavily indebted and has to bring up his two notorious nephews and a niece. One day, the kids go to a carnival and befriend a runaway bride. Trouble ensues when they decide to help her by bringing her home and keep her out of Rahul's sight.

programme.title: Maine Pyaar Kyun Kiya
programme.desc: Samir, a handsome orthopaedic surgeon, lies about being married, to keep the women falling for him at bay. However, when he meets and falls in love with Sonia, he is forced to conjure up a wife and fake a divorce, in order to marry her.

programme.title: Luck
programme.desc: Musa, an underworld kingpin and a firm believer in luck, designs a series of life threatening adventure sports with hefty prize money for people around the world. However, the participants can only survive and win if they are exceptionally lucky.

programme.title: Gundaraj
programme.desc: Ajay lives a happy life with his loving family and girlfriend. To top it all, he earns a high-end job in the city. But when he starts his new job, he gets framed for assaulting three college girls and goes to prison which destroys his personal life.

programme.title: Chalta Hai Yaar
programme.desc: Namdev, a man who supplies material for dead people's last rites, is frustrated with being mistreated by his wife and judged by society. When he attempts suicide, a restless soul saves his life and helps him to win back his dignity.

programme.title: Lootere
programme.desc: Two police officers Karan and Ali investigate the murder of their colleague. Karan is put in charge of protecting Anjali, a bar dancer and key witness to the murder. Trouble arises when Karan falls for her which compromises his objectivity.

programme.title: Crane Fighter
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl (Judy Lee) secretly learns the deadly art of the Crane technique against the wishes of her father, himself a former Shaolin man. Soon, she becomes an expert and has a run-in with local Manchu lackeys who are on the warpath for all Shaolin students. Enter the debonair Raymond Lui, who teams up with Judy, and together they defeat the evil Manchu warlord Kao Chin Chun.

programme.title: Mission for the Dragon
programme.desc: Dragon Lee and Carter Wong, team up in this excellent offering from Korea. Two sons swear to avenge their father's murder. They set off in search of the last man to see him alive. Climatic fighting ensues.

programme.title: Golden Belt
programme.desc: A man seeks revenge on his enemy who kidnapped and raised his child many years ago.

programme.title: The Tongfather
programme.desc: The violent tale of an undercover agent's mission to topple a Chinese opium ring that is masterminded by a ruthless kingpin known only as "The TongFather." Great old school Kung Fu film directed and starring Roc Tien.

programme.title: Crane Fighter
programme.desc: A beautiful young girl (Judy Lee) secretly learns the deadly art of the Crane technique against the wishes of her father, himself a former Shaolin man. Soon, she becomes an expert and has a run-in with local Manchu lackeys who are on the warpath for all Shaolin students. Enter the debonair Raymond Lui, who teams up with Judy, and together they defeat the evil Manchu warlord Kao Chin Chun.

programme.title: Mission for the Dragon
programme.desc: Dragon Lee and Carter Wong, team up in this excellent offering from Korea. Two sons swear to avenge their father's murder. They set off in search of the last man to see him alive. Climatic fighting ensues.

programme.title: Golden Belt
programme.desc: A man seeks revenge on his enemy who kidnapped and raised his child many years ago.

programme.title: The Tongfather
programme.desc: The violent tale of an undercover agent's mission to topple a Chinese opium ring that is masterminded by a ruthless kingpin known only as "The TongFather." Great old school Kung Fu film directed and starring Roc Tien.

programme.title: Stranger from Canton
programme.desc: Extremely popular kung fu film, set during the early 1900’s during the last years of the Qing dynasty and the rise of Sun Yat-Sen. Loyalists to Sun are gathering, and Qing officials are hunting them down and brutally executing them. Jing Fong (Jason Pai-Piao) arrives from the US and is surprised at the injustices he sees. He’s later framed by the henchmen of Qing lord (Thompson Kao Kang) for murder, but joins forces with local martial arts master Wong Yee (Tony Liu) to take down the Qing officials.

programme.title: Guy With Secret Kung Fu
programme.desc: Dead Eye and his gang are terrorizing a small Chinese region. Chan Ling and his group of misfit friends take it upon themselves to stop evildoers by learning the Super Kung Fu style. Luckily for them, a mysterious stranger is also after Dead Eye. Brilliant action from the Mystery of Chess Boxing posse.

programme.title: Duel at the Forest
programme.desc: Passion and the agony of injustice boil over into an unshakeable resolve, as Pan Lung returns home after five years in prison for a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Bruce Kung Fu Girls
programme.desc: Five pretty girls go to Hong Kong to stay with their uncle, who is a police superintendent. Soon they run into a gang of thieves, which gives them a chance to put their excellent kung fu skills to good use. This Bod Squad will kick your ass!

programme.title: Stranger from Canton
programme.desc: Extremely popular kung fu film, set during the early 1900’s during the last years of the Qing dynasty and the rise of Sun Yat-Sen. Loyalists to Sun are gathering, and Qing officials are hunting them down and brutally executing them. Jing Fong (Jason Pai-Piao) arrives from the US and is surprised at the injustices he sees. He’s later framed by the henchmen of Qing lord (Thompson Kao Kang) for murder, but joins forces with local martial arts master Wong Yee (Tony Liu) to take down the Qing officials.

programme.title: Dog Men
programme.desc: In a not-too-distant future only a few homo sapiens are left. Struggling for survival they are forced to live from hunting the last remaining animals in the peripheral ruins of an advanced human civilization. But they are unaware of being stalked themselves by a mysterious scanner. A science-fiction story about hunting and being hunted, about extinction and survival, about dogs - and men.

programme.title: Dolce Vita
programme.desc: A Series of stories following a week in the life of a philandering tabloid journalist living in Rome.

programme.title: DOMESTIC
programme.desc: Domestic is a story about people who eat the animals they love and animals who love people unconditionally. A rabbit, a hen, a cat, a dog and a dove pass through the lives of the main characters and influence their evolution.

programme.title: Don't Fade Away
programme.desc: Life was easy for Jackson White (RYAN KWANTEN). With looks, brains, and athletic ability, the possibilities seemed endless. But when he came to New York City to pursue a career in the music industry, he was so seduced by money and status that he lost track of who he was. Now, with both his personal and professional lives on the brink of disaster, he retreats home to care for his dying father (BEAU BRIDGES). While in North Carolina, he confronts the friends he lost track of and the girl he left behind (MISCHA BARTON).

programme.title: Early Summer
programme.desc: A family chooses a match for their daughter Noriko, but she, surprisingly, has her own plans.

programme.title: Eli Eli
programme.desc: An elderly couple, Mendel and Hannah Shapiro, need to raise money to hang onto their farm and turn to their adult children for help.

programme.title: Eternally Yours
programme.desc: Anita Halstead, swept off her feet by magician Arturo, finds the results less than magical.

programme.title: Fall Down Dead
programme.desc: A metropolitan city is in the grip of fear when rolling blackouts bring out a serial killer dubbed The Picasso Killer...

programme.title: Faust
programme.desc: The demon Mephisto wagers with God that he can corrupt a mortal man's soul.

programme.title: Flying Lessons
programme.desc: With her life at a crossroads, 25 year old Sophie Conway (MAGGIE GRACE) returns to the small town she always tried to forget. Once home, she’s faced with past lovers, a tangled relationship with her Mother, and Harry Pleasant, an Alzheimer's patient who in quite an opposite fashion, shares in Sophie’s struggle to remember.

programme.title: Frame Of Mind
programme.desc: Desperately seeking a new start, NYPD Detective, David Secca (CARL T. EVANS) and his pregnant wife escape the struggles of New York City and return to their hometown in New Jersey. He reluctantly takes a job with the local Police Department. His priorities abruptly change when he stumbles upon a mysterious strip of 8mm film, discovered accidently in an antique jewelry box. Things really heat up as it becomes obvious that he found a key piece of evidence in the Kennedy assassination.

programme.title: Gung Ho!
programme.desc: The true story of Carlson's Raiders and their World War II attack on Makin Island.

programme.title: Harvest, The
programme.desc: Thousands of foreign workers support today the most known Italian excellence: agri-food production. A docu-musical shows their daily exploitation.

programme.title: Hell's House
programme.desc: Jimmy idolizes bootlegger Matt, and when he refuses to implicate his friend, he is sent to reform school. He befriends Shorty, a boy with a heart condition, and escapes to let the world know about the brutal conditions.

programme.title: Hell Town (AKA Born to the West)
programme.desc: Can Dare Rudd prove he is responsible enough to win the heart of Judy and also outwit the crooked saloon owner?

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: Two Became Three
programme.desc: Relive the magic of one of the most memorable weddings in history- the marriage of Prince Harry & Meghan Markle. From the fanfare to the first kiss and star-studded guest-list; see all the best moments from Harry & Meghan's historic wedding day. With footage from inside the St. George's chapel we bring to you the moments from the very heart of the royal wedding coverage.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: The Revelations
programme.desc: Harry and Meghan’s decision to leave royal life behind was far and away from the stiff upper lip announcements of the past. This was a royal family feud that had gone completely out of control. This is the other side of the Sussex’s story from alleged sources close to the couple and recently disclosed accounts.

programme.title: Sweet Micky For President
programme.desc: Music and politics collide when Pras Michel of Fugees returns to his homeland of Haiti to mobilize a presidential campaign for a controversial local musician: Michel Martelly aka Sweet Micky. When Pras's former bandmate, superstar Wyclef Jean, also enters the presidential race the election gains international notoriety attracting the likes of Bill Clinton, Sean Penn and Ben Stiller.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours: Prince
programme.desc: The world mourned the loss of one of it’s most innovative performers in April 2016. While Prince’s official autopsy confirmed that the singer died from an overdose of the painkiller fentanyl, investigators have still been looking to clear up some additional mysteries surrounding the case. We take a look into the last 24 hours of his death and look for the real answers as to what happened.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours: John Lennon
programme.desc: On the morning of December 8, 1980 John Lennon was happy in New York and looking forward to the future. Having just turned 40 he had finally recovered from the years as a Beatle. But by the end of that day John would be dead and the world would be in mourning. Here are the final 24 hours of the ex-Beatle’s life before he was so senselessly murdered by Mark David Chapman."

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours: Amy Winehouse
programme.desc: After a very public battle with addiction the world was saddened to hear the shocking news that Amy Winehouse was found dead in her bedroom at the young age of 27. We investigate what really happened during the final 24 hours of the singer’s life, with exclusive interviews and testimonials.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours: Michael Jackson
programme.desc: The ultimate king of pop Michael Jackson spent his last hours battling insomnia and pleading with his personal physician to give him a powerful anesthetic to combat his chronic sleeplessness according to a search-warrant affidavit. We explore the truth behind this and discover the real facts, with exclusive footage and testimonials.

programme.title: Wildfire
programme.desc: Nicola is a natural winemaker living in a remote village near Crotone, where his atavistic pursuit of wine is under active siege from climate related wildfires and the prolonged dry seasons. For Nicola, and other winemakers like him, this environmental change has existential consequences; it threatens his livelihood. “Wildfire” patiently observes Nicola in this affective state of anxiety—as the wildfire grows within him—as he’s forced to alter the course of his harvest in real time. Directed by Andree Ljutica.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Days
programme.desc: This is a fascinating documentary that gives insight into the last days of Hitler’s life as well as his death. With expert contributors like Guy Walters and Dr. Lisa Pine, this project uncovers an intriguing perspective on history.

programme.title: The Real Oppenheimer
programme.desc: In 1945, the world was ushered into the atomic age. With his role as the Father of the Bomb solidified, Oppenheimer became increasingly worried about the potential danger that scientific inventions could pose to humanity.

programme.title: Meghan Markle: American Duchess
programme.desc: Meghan's rise to the top of British society revealed some deep- seated issues in a multicultural country. How did the most adored woman in the world become the subject of such vicious tabloid gossip?

programme.title: Meghan Markle: Changing Traditions
programme.desc: She’s here, she’s royal and she’s shaking things up. Meghan Markle has now become very much part of the most famous family in the world, but this strong and powerful woman is not stopping there.

programme.title: Meghan Markle: Unforgiven
programme.desc: Drama, controversy, reconciliation. Meghan Markle was thrown into the spotlight in 2017 after her whirlwind romance with Prince Harry took centre stage. Falling in and out of favour with the press and public alike, Meghan has proven to divide the opinions of royal followers around the world. This is her story.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan The Complete Story: The Meeting
programme.desc: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle, Duke and Duchess of Sussex, are the modern-day fairytale we deserve. From the first whispers of a possible romance between the former Suits actress and former bad-boy of Kensington Palace to a wedding straight out of a Disney cartoon, the royal power couple has captured hearts across the globe.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan The Complete Story: The Wedding
programme.desc: It hasn’t been all unicorns and rainbows for Harry and Meghan. The wedded couple have weathered so many storms and media scandals that you’d think they’ve been married for a decade, not a few short years. Through it all, Meghan has been the picture of grace and poise. And Harry has pushed back against every royal protocol set in stone to defend and support his wife.

programme.title: Harry & Meghan The Complete Story: The Goodbye
programme.desc: The decision was clear - duty or love? Will their decision to start a new life in America distance them in more than just miles from Harry's royal family Their new life in Hollywood has changed the course of royal history forever.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part I: The Young Princess
programme.desc: From Diana’s first steps into the royal world to the birth of her two sons and heirs, this documentary tells the story of Diana's early years.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part II: Broken Hearts
programme.desc: The marriage of Prince Charles and Princess Diana remains infamous for being one of the most turbulent royal weddings in modern history. As the cracks began to form the world watched. What should have been the fairytale couple could not hold any longer. Discover the truth of what really lead to the split, as the world behind palace gates is uncovered.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part III: Legacy Of Love
programme.desc: A late night phone call from Paris brought news that would rock the world. The sudden and tragic death of Princess Diana devastated millions. Hear what it was really like to be at the eye of the storm, as Diana's closest friend and confidant shares his story of heartbreak and farewell.

programme.title: The Taylor Swift Story: Dare To Dream
programme.desc: The incredible journey of Taylor Swift all began with a girl, a guitar and a dream. Taylor Swift is a ten time Grammy winner, and the youngest recipient in history of the music industry’s highest honour, follow the story of an artist who turned a childhood dream into an empire.

programme.title: Selena Gomez: Devotion
programme.desc: After returning from her 5 year break from music, Selena Gomez has blown the world away with her 3rd studio album Rare. She has transformed over the years, from Disney pop star to award winning film and tv producer. She is one of the biggest stars in Hollywood and is certain one of the most devoted to her art.

programme.title: The Barbie Story
programme.desc: A documentary about the origins of Barbie and her worldwide impact.

programme.title: Beyonce: Queen B
programme.desc: One of the most recognizable figures in contemporary music. Get lost in the ultimate story of modern day superstardom as we take you through the incredible journey of Beyoncé.

programme.title: Justin Bieber: Rise to Fame
programme.desc: The Transformation from small town Canadian boy to international superstar happened almost overnight. Teen Idol delves into how the young star copes with fame and how he chooses to spend his limited free time. With previously unseen footage and interviews with the star himself, this is a must see for any Belieber!

programme.title: Morning Giggles
programme.desc: Laugh out loud as two insects help a caterpillar in her metamorphosis and much more in this collection of funny animated short films.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Adventures with Dennis & Gnasher as Dennis comes up with his own martial art and the gang decide to build a swimming pool.

programme.title: LOL Family Comedy

programme.title: Feet Up Drama

programme.title: Up With Baby
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Mogu & Perol and visit the Imaginary Friend Shop in this collection of animated short films.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose!
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal, Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn’t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he wants, you can’t help being sucked in by Moose’s relentless optimism and zest for life.

programme.title: Discover Real Lives
programme.desc: A documentary on Brigitte Bardot and an insight into the Apatani women in these short documentaries on beauty.

programme.title: Morning Giggles
programme.desc: Laugh out loud as two insects help a caterpillar in her metamorphosis and much more in this collection of funny animated short films.

programme.title: Christmas In New York
programme.desc: In the vein of Love Actually, the story follows six different couples in a posh Manhattan hotel over the course of one night just before Christmas.

programme.title: Christmas in the City
programme.desc: With the threat of having to close her father's candy store, Wendy and her six-year-old daughter Grace travel to the big city in hopes of making extra holiday cash to save the store.

programme.title: The Merry In-laws
programme.desc: After Alex gets engaged to Peter, she goes to meet his parents for the first time, not knowing they are actually Santa and Mrs. Claus.

programme.title: Santa Girl
programme.desc: Santa Claus' only daughter wants to experience the "real world" before she must marry the son of Jack Frost, a boy she has never met, and take over the family business. Along with her trusty elf, Cassie Claus sets off to college while trying to keep her magic powers and famous father a secret. At school Cassie is pursued by two boys: Sam, sweetly awkward and J.R., handsome and wealthy. As her impending arranged marriage looms, Cassie struggles with her feelings for Sam and her obligation to her father and Christmas.

programme.title: Cupid's Christmas
programme.desc: As Santa Claus searches for his lost Reindeer the love story of Katie Luke is re-ignited.

programme.title: Holiday Baggage
programme.desc: Respectively a pediatrician and soon to be retired commercial pilot, Sarah and Pete Murphy, who have two grown daughters Lisa and Holly, have been legally separated for ten years. They lead different lives, Pete who lives hard, cavorts around the world and did cheat on Sarah when they were together, while Sarah is more focused on family. Since the separation which the girls mistakenly believe is a full divorce, Pete has been out of his family's life, he who has made little effort to keep in touch, while Lisa in particular has purposefully excluded her father from her life, including not inviting him to her wedding to longtime fiancé and family friend/neighbor Andrew Priester, and not having told him that they are having a baby. Sarah has not condoned Lisa's attitude, but also has done nothing to try and change it. Just prior to Thanksgiving, Pete is forced to return to Chicago to meet with Sarah when he makes the decision to remarry, to a woman named Kelly, who is young enough to be his daughter and with who he is moving permanently to the Bahamas, and thus requires Sarah to sign the final divorce papers. He expects solely to be in Chicago long enough to see Sarah and the girls to tell them the news and to invite them to the wedding. Out of circumstance, Pete is forced to stay in Chicago longer than he anticipated. In finding out about all that has and is going on in Sarah and the girls' lives, Pete may take stock of his relationships with them and if time will have healed all wounds in their family.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: Traumatized by her past Christmas is not at the top of Sarahs list this time of year. However, waltzing through lifes unexpected emergencies, she is taught the Christmas dance.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas

programme.desc: A young park guide holds six people captive, treating them as caged animals, to deliver his chilling message of freedom.

programme.title: Stronghold
programme.desc: A young woman living in the woods with her mother meets a stranger who makes her question everything.

programme.title: Killer
programme.desc: In March of 2020, a pandemic strikes the world. Ten friends decide to quarantine under the same roof. Unfortunately, one of them is a killer.

programme.title: House of Inequity
programme.desc: A day trip takes a turn for the worse when a group of friends investigate an abandoned house, The House of Inequity.

programme.desc: Four little misfits from working-class Massachusetts cope with the highs and lows of punk rock stardom. SNL/Rick and Morty's Chris Parnell narrates.

programme.desc: "Catching Air" is a documentary showcasing diverse air guitarists, defying stereotypes and inspiring hidden talents.

programme.title: The Food Cure
programme.desc: Six advanced cancer patients make an unusual choice. They decide to face the disease with their forks. The patients embark on an arduous 7-year journey as they attempt to eat and juice their way back to health...with surprising results.

programme.title: Eating you Alive
programme.desc: eating You Alive addresses why 30.4 million people die each year and provides evidence based science, expert testimony and inspirational stories of disease reversal and a discovery that can cure our top killer diseases.

programme.title: First Responders In Crisis
programme.desc: A documentary about the mental health struggles of first responders, through the lens of a small town in New England.

programme.title: Closed for Storm
programme.desc: Closed For Storm is a film detailing the incredible history of a massive, American theme park that was eventually left completely abandoned

programme.title: Stranger Fruit

programme.title: Entangled
programme.desc: A collision between one of the most endangered species, North America’s most valuable fishery, and a federal agency mandated to protect both.

programme.desc: Scientists venture into the virtually unknown interior of Antarctica to explore a lake buried 3,600 feet beneath.

programme.desc: About the toxins that exist within the groundwater and aquifer that supplies the drinking water for all of Long Island.

programme.title: Song for Hope

programme.desc: A veteran returns home to his pregnant wife after being wounded in combat. Suffering from PTSD, Ryan begins to see strange beings in his house at night, caused by a sinister presence, which has been haunting him in his nightmares.

programme.desc: An AWOL soldier with PTSD goes into hiding along with his brother and a few friends. They retreat into a rural farm area unaware that the outside world has ceased to function. On their way back to civilization, his brother is attacked by an infected farmer. He quickly morphs into a rabid animal and lives for exactly three hours. Realizing they are in grave danger, they head back to the forest trying to outlive the legions of the infected.

programme.desc: Samantha sues Elizabeth and PI Ricardo for $40,000 over false accusations. Elizabeth hired Ricardo to investigate Samantha's husband but wrongly accused Samantha. Samantha claims harassment, and defamation. Elizabeth and Ricardo deny responsibility.

programme.desc: Chris sues ex-wife Lisa for $10K, citing emotional distress and property damage. He says Lisa punctured his emotional support doll, "Dolly." Lisa denies it, blaming Chris's objectophilia and claiming Dolly deflated when he sat on it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Bloomberg Crypto
programme.desc: The latest news, analysis and interviews covering the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets
programme.desc: The most important global business and breaking markets news and information as it happens.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the worlds of business and finance and the interesting stories of global technology, politics, economics and more.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Close
programme.desc: Alix Steel, Romaine Bostick and Scarlet Fu own the market-moving breaking news around the closing bell; a synthesis of the top stories; key insights from investors, strategists and the companies of today and tomorrow.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: The unprecedented devastation of Australia's 2019-2020 "Black Summer" bushfires, its apocalyptic scenes broadcast globally for all to see, was a warning to the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Months after the train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio, residents are still looking for answers; while the work continues, divergent opinions from government agencies, independent experts and contractors are adding to the anxiety residents have.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Live from Tokyo and Sydney, with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and bringing global investors everything they need to know as the trading day begins in Asia.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wealth With David Rubenstein
programme.desc: David Rubenstein is talking with Josh Friedman; The co-founder and co-CEO of Canyon Partners.

programme.title: Leaders with Lacqua
programme.sub-title: Novo Nordisk CEO Lars Fruergaard Jørgensen
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua travels to Novo Nordisk in Copenhagen and speaks to its chief executive, Lars Fruergaard Jørgensen, about how he is navigating the company's meteoric rise and the sweeping changes its products could bring.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: Asia
programme.desc: In an effort to provide extensive coverage of worldwide financial markets, Bloomberg features several regional shows under the "Bloomberg Markets" banner, with each focusing on that geographic area's markets. This Asian-focused version is hosted by Shery Ahn, David Ingles, Haidi Lun, Rishaad Salamat and Angie Lau. They report the latest business news and speak with the likes of political and business leaders to help investors make investment decisions that build their portfolios.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Based in London, Francine Lacqua speaks with high-profile guests in the heart of global business, economics, finance and politics.

programme.title: Bloomberg UK
programme.desc: A weekly deep dive into the biggest economic, financial and political issues facing the UK; going beyond the market moves with expert analysis and top interviews, from the heart of London.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: The Open
programme.desc: Jonathan Ferro takes viewers through the market-moving events from around the world during the most important hour of the trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets
programme.desc: The most important global business and breaking markets news and information as it happens.

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Tri-5 Chevy gets a new exhaust, but only after the guys fix the modified cross-member that just wasn’t cooperating.

programme.title: Two Guys Garage
programme.desc: Willie B goes on location to experience a two day build school for a Factory Five Roadster.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: The RM Auction Company has worked with Dale before as a buyer, seller, historian, and caretaker at the prestigious Lee Hartung auction. But this event is no last minute rush to define one man’s treasures. This is a well calculated, time consuming, multi-media, and multi motorcycle and prized art deal.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Home Depot Senior Vice President, Gordon Erickson, is a huge fan of Wheels Through Time. He is also a huge supporter of the Wounded Warrior program. For years the hardware giant has been donating goods and services to help returning servicemen with their fix-it-up projects. Now they would like to go one step further and build a WWII military bike to raise awareness and funds. Only problem is where to get one? Enter Dale and an exhaustive, time sensitive, cross country search for a rare military machine.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Promoters of the prestigious Amelia Island Concours have called on Dale to develop a show and field bikes for an “Orphan Bike” show. They have defined orphan bike as extremely rare, that aren't a Harley nor Indian machines.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.sub-title: Time is Not On Their Side
programme.desc: For Dale and Matt sometimes the dotted line to treasure splits and heads in opposite directions. In this edition of What’s in the Barn, time is thrust to the forefront of this multi-state, long distance, north, south search. Timeless and priceless 110 year old bikes, antique cars, airplanes, and the infamous Egberts 1930 neon Harley-Davidson sign that coined the phrase “Ride a Winner” are high on this father and son’s list of “must haves”. The clock ticks, both literally and figuratively, on one rare time piece and two old-timer’s cars, bikes, and automobiles.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A California collector gambles on a big payday from his Crocker/Caddy combo.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “The Century Race”: Dale believes he found the bike that will help him beat a rival in an annual race of 100 year old motorcycles. But will it run?

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “A Motorcycle Crime Story”: The horrific tale of a double murder over money and motorcycles.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “Yes, Dale there is a 100 Year Old Harley”: Dale hopes his labor of love becomes a prized possession when a six-figure Harley goes to auction.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A thousand bulging barns of choppers, bobbers, and board trackers are emptied and on display in the Quad Cities.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A vague tip leads Matt and Dale into a WWII era military warehouse and beyond.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: The natural landscape of Jekyll Island, GA makes for a great backdrop to showcase the country’s greatest cars. But the ocean air and remoteness of this GA barrier island is no place to leave a painstakingly rebuilt ‘59 Imperial Speedster. Host Skip Smith makes it his mission to locate the talented builder behind this island mystery. Guest host Totem joins Bryan Fuller in the C&O lots to pick out his favorites.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Imagination, ingenuity, and heartache join friends who set out with a simple goal of transforming a ‘35 Plymouth into a running taxi cab. Provenance and passion take center stage as families and friends strive for best in show. Host Rickey Gadson checks out perfect replicas of the original Shelby Cobras and takes Skip and Bryan on ‘borrowed’ taxi ride.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Call the Peach State Challengers a “car club” and you will quickly be corrected. The defenders of everything Dodge are “family” and they make no excuses for their loyalty to brand and brother. Spend a day at the track with these Challengers and find out what their version of the family photo looks like.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Former Jet Ski Champion Ryan Hardwick has succeeded in everything he’s touched in racing and business, so why not race Lamborghinis! Hardwick has found rapid success with his high tech training methods; he shares his secrets with host Rickey Gadson in this episode of C&O.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Daimlers and Morgans, and Citroens, oh my! Caffeine & Octane is known for having something for everyone. That reputation grows stronger as Bob Boston’s collection, on the lunatic fringe of automotive, rattles into an event; guest host Katherine Legge explains the competitor to her racing sponsor Acura, Porsche.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Early spring in Jekyll Island, GA is something to behold. Add a few hundred of the country’s coolest rides for Caffeine & Octane at the Beach, and it’s a thing of beauty. Models that blasted the glass ceiling of expectation at the all makes and models show include a hand-built, twin-turbo Tucker, a one-off 1951 Kaiser Drag’N, and a Roadkill Custom known only as Blasphemi!

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane is back at the beach on Jekyll Island with a focus on cars and families. Fathers & sons, with their barn-find Pilot House trucks and Plymouth Satellites, call cars the glue that keeps them bonded together with C&O being the best place to show them off.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: On this edition of Caffeine & Octane, we’ll go inside the head of Master Builder Bryan Fuller at the SEMA car show, the largest annual trade show in the country; SEMA always brings out the best in the automotive industry. From a jaw dropping Javelin to a multimillion-dollar Pagani, Brian will prove to you, what happens in Vegas, doesn’t always stay in Vegas! Ryan Hardwick guest hosts and ventures deep into the C&O lots to find his favorite ride of the day.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Take apart and assemble a motor in less than 30 minutes? Sure, NASCAR pit crews can make the claim, but can a rag tag group of kids with names like Jelly Donut, Butter Bean, and Wonder Woman claim the pit fame? Host Rickey Gadson heads to the Sims Academy to settle a bet. This ultra fast half-hour edition of Caffeine & Octane also includes a builder’s take on an Ultra Four Unlimited Off-Road Racer; Ryan Hardwick joins the gang at Caffeine and Octane.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Demetrio Montalvo likes American music, American food, and especially American cars. Only one problem - Demetrio lives in Cuba. A Visa, bestowed to him from some American friends in high places, lets him travel to the States to search for tough to find automotive parts and attend his favorite car show. Showing up to Caffeine & Octane in a cool caddy is the easy part. Picking parts to take back home presents a unique set of challenges for the Cuban car builder; Formula Drift racer Federico Sceriffo brings the first ever Formula Drift Ferrari to C&O.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Porsche collector, customizer, and Urban Outlaw, Magnus Walker is a world-wide rock star to fans of the German car company. So, when Caffeine & Octane producers invited him to travel cross country to tell the story of a hidden Porsche collection tangled in a North Georgia Vineyard, they were surprised when he signed on. No sour grapes here, what Walker found at the Wolf Mountain Winery will impress even those with the most refined palette for Porsches.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: A Hall of Famer?s search for an Exotic Car that fits; a blind man?s ?touchy feely? approach to seeing great cars.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Back to the future with a Majestic build from Fuller Moto that showcases 3-D printed parts, an electric motor, and hub-centric steering.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: The Fastest Man on Two Wheels
programme.desc: Horsepower and million-dollar sticker shock, from two and four wheels, dominate this edition of C & O.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.sub-title: Power Play: Proline's Search for 3000+ HP
programme.desc: A need for speed in a Sleepy Georgia town has engineers pushing the boundaries to exceed 3000 horsepower.

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Turn of the century cars?with wooden wheels?at 85mph?oh my!

programme.title: Caffeine & Octane
programme.desc: Urban Outlaw and designer Magnus Walker weighs in on his beloved Porsche and the legend of Hot Wheels.

programme.sub-title: Proving Provenance on a One-Off Ferrari
programme.desc: Tracing the origins and solving the mystery of a controversial all-aluminum bodied 512 BBI Boxer Ferrari.

programme.desc: Caffeine & Octane goes Turbo in the Twin Cities; Ferrari Drifter Federico Sceriffo finds a home in Atlanta.

programme.desc: "Go Fast Girl" Katherne Legge's Model A Racer.
