programme.sub-title: The World's Largest Monthly Car Show Goes Up for Sale to the Highest Bidder
programme.desc: Doubling down for cars and coffee.

programme.title: Helping Hands Garage
programme.desc: This '73 Dodge Charger was pushed aside when the Barron family’s oldest daughter passed away. Now the family is ready to charge ahead and get the car running again in Kaitlyn’s honor.

programme.title: Helping Hands Garage
programme.desc: Katie, Collete and the Helping Hands team up with non-profit organization “Wheels of Success” to restore an Acura to provide to a hardworking single mom. The Helping Hands team will make sure "Gray Bay Bay" can stay on the road for another 100k miles.

programme.title: Tow Jobs: Tennessee
programme.desc: Jeff and Kristen meet an irate young man parked illegally then swing over to get a mom out of a predicament. All in a days work!

programme.title: Tow Jobs: Tennessee
programme.desc: Jeff and Kristen have a day with a few folks after taking their cars to impound.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A cross-country race to lay claim to some of the world’s most sought after works specials.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “12hrs. & Running”: Dale turns a surprise 60th birthday party into a challenge to his guests to start 120 of the rarest motorcycles in the world.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: An family farm in the mid-west contains houses, barns, outbuildings, trailers, grain silos and buses full of old stuff and perhaps the biggest stash of undiscovered old motorcycles in the country. The collection was put together by their unnamed father. Seller agrees to have Dale broker rare Excelsior for high-end client. Dale has the buyer, but will he outbid his own client for the exclusive find?

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Matt is out for revenge. Last year Dale beat him badly at the Annual Vintage bike race in Barber, Alabama. But this year there is a whole new tale to tell. With just days until the race - Dale is secretly struggling to get the bike he beat Matt with last year up and working. Matt struggles just to locate a 100-year old bike. Matt's prayers are answered thanks to an old Catholic Priest he located who has possession of a bike. The priest might let Matt have the bike to race - but there are conditions. The toughest one: Don't tell Dale you have it. Can Matt afford to buy the bike and get it running in time for the race without Dale seeing it? Will Dale even get his broken bike started? And if they ever get to race, will Matt exact his revenge?

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Built in the mid-60’s by eccentric engineer “Wild Bill” Gelbke, the Road Dog was, and still is, the largest motorcycle ever built. It utilized aircraft tubing, Corvette disc brakes, and a Chevy truck differential to keep it stable. The one-off creation disappeared when Gelbke did in 1978. Outflanked once when the bike was spotted and sold to a private collector in 1995, Dale has vowed to locate the machine and make Wheels Through Time its final resting place.

programme.desc: S1:E8 Ariel, Zoey, Eli, and Jim focus on the process of creating lyrics for "Love is the Highway," a song about peace.

programme.title: Lost and Found Music Studios
programme.desc: S1:E8 Annabelle tries to get in with the in-crowd at Lost and Found, with disastrous results. Meanwhile, singer-songwriter Tyler Shaw visits the studio, and Jude and Rachel battle for a chance to be his personal assistant for the day.

programme.title: Bingo and Molly
programme.desc: E8- Molly is elated when Bingo brings home cousin Lou’s turtle to turtle-sit for a day. Disappointed in having to return the turtle, Molly is excited to wake up the following morning to find a goldfish on her desk, until it passes away.

programme.title: Ariel and Zoey and Eli Too
programme.sub-title: Ariel and Zoey and Eli Too
programme.desc: S1:E2 Ariel, Zoey, and Eli tell the story behind the famous hymn “America the Beautiful,” and also interview American Idol Runner-up David Archuleta.

programme.title: Steal the Show
programme.desc: S2:E1 Ariel, Zoey, and Eli as they discuss the creation and meaning behind a few love songs that deal with falling in love and breaking up.

programme.title: Lost and Found Music Studios
programme.desc: S1:E13 The girls' band holds auditions to replace Maggie, which presents Clara with an opportunity to make a fresh start. Meanwhile, the boys prepare to headline their first gig, as Michelle tries to figure out if John really likes her.

programme.title: Bingo and Molly
programme.desc: E13- Bingo and Duck are going on a hike in the woods with Ranger Big Bunny. Molly is upset because she also wants to go but is not invited.

programme.title: Revelations
programme.desc: E13- The year is 1856, and a Chinese store owner and his grandson are being intimidated by a gang of local racist teenagers.

programme.title: Elizabeth Stanton's Great Big World
programme.desc: Lights, Camera, Action!- Elizabeth and her celebrity friends Lucas Cruikshank and Jennifer Veal take the exclusive WB VIP Studio Tour! See the real sets, real costumes, props and vehicles, and real soundstages from your favorite WB films and TV shows!

programme.title: Toon Goggles
programme.desc: All your favorite kids shows for free including fan favorites such as Angry Birds, Talking Tom, Om Nom, Gummy Bears, and more!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: Tom Thomas accidently drops his mom's wedding ring down the drain and thinks it is gone forever until Simka and Nolik help him retrieve the ring from the drain trap with the help of a pack-o-mat.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: Tom Thomas has to return a DVD he borrowed from his friend but discovers his player can't read the disk anymore. Simka and Nolik help Tom Thomas clean it so it works again.

programme.title: PopPixie
programme.desc: Pam is worried because she still hasn't found out which is her talent that will enable her to become a PopPixie. As Ninfea and her friends encourages her, a carnivorous plant invades Pixieville.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Peter Pan
programme.sub-title: Teamwork of the People: Part 1 of 5
programme.desc: Michael jumps for joy. He is holding the DVD of "CAPTAIN MUSCLES 2" which they are going to watch it tonight in Neverland!

programme.title: The New Adventures of Peter Pan
programme.sub-title: Teamwork of the People: Part 2 of 5
programme.desc: When Synapse threatens to spray Captain Muscles with a serum that will exacerbate his faults, Sienna, caught up in the film, falls and causes a magical short-circuit.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Peter Pan
programme.sub-title: Teamwork of the People: Part 3 of 5
programme.desc: The potion and Captain Muscles cross through the screen. Hit by the serum, Sienna writhes around and then flees into the forest, growling.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Peter Pan
programme.sub-title: Teamwork of the People: Part 4 of 5
programme.desc: Captain Muscles and Peter Pan are immediately ready for action because John explains that they need to find a way to stop Sienna before he grows and crushes all of Neverland!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: I'll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn't chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it's all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren't really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It's a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: GWR Incredible Record Breakers
programme.desc: Guinness World Records presents Incredible Record Breakers from all over.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.desc: The Sunny Bunnies are five fluffy balls of light named Turbo, Big Boo, Shiny, Iris and Hopper who can appear anywhere there is light. The Bunnies always bring joy and happiness, beaming down to explore new and exciting locations, finding fun and mischievous games to enjoy.

programme.sub-title: Lost in Space / A Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Strong winds have been forecast for Misha’s neighbourhood. People are being advised to keep their windows closed because gusts of this nature can cause strange things to happen. Misha looks out the window, frightened. She hears a loud sound and we see a space ship fly by. Yes, it’s a UFO, for sure. Misha tells her friends that she saw a space ship. Could it be that extraterrestrials are real? / Misha wants to celebrate her birthday on Sunday, and makes some invitations to give to all her friends. When she gets to school, however, she finds out that Carla Rabbit has just passed out invitations to her birthday party, which is on Sunday too! Plus, Carla’s invitations are much prettier. The two girls begin to compete on who can hold the best party.

programme.title: Misha the Purple Cat
programme.sub-title: Shopping is a Bore / Artists in the Making
programme.desc: Misha and her friends are excited because their favorite story illustrator coming to visit the school library. But when school lets out, Mum announces to Misha that they have some errands to do. Misha grudgingly agrees to tag along with her mother as they stop at one store after another. The worst part is that they keep running into Mrs. Poodle along the way, which makes Misha nervous. / Today there’s a field trip to the museum: how boring!. Just as they arrive, Howie pulls out some chocolate cookies and accidentally gets some chocolate on a painting. The kids try to clean the spot with a rag but it just gets bigger. They keep rubbing until the spot becomes a big stain. They have to do something, and quickly: they can make another painting.

programme.title: My Friend Lovie
programme.sub-title: Name Game/Lovie Makes a New Friend / Painting Competition/Lovie Helps Cloudie / Cardboard Pirates/Boltie Joins the Playdate
programme.desc: Lovie and Shinie make up silly names/Lovie and Shinie meet a new kid who's not so sure how to make friends. / Shinie shows off his art skills/Lovie finds out that cheering up Cloudie is harder than she thought. / Shinie wants a telescope too/Lovie and friends find out that Boltie is way too quick at everything they try to play.

programme.title: Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic
programme.sub-title: Ms. Poodle's Hair Car Situation / Little Doggy's Wheelchair Gets a Makeover / The Elephant Family's Van Is Too Small
programme.desc: Ms. Poodle stops by Mr. Monkey, Monkey Mechanic's garage with a hairbrained problem - every time she gets her hair done, it's ruined the moment she drives away. Her car is messing up her hair! Can Mr. Monkey fix her car by the time Ms. Monkey comes back from her hair appointment? Only if he has his trusty monkey wrench and a plan! / Mr. Monkey is having a party and his first guest has arrived - it's Little Doggy in his wheelchair! He loves parties and came to help decorate. When the garage is ready, Little Doggy is a little sad - his wheelchair is just so ordinary. He really wants it to have some pizzazz for the party! Can Mr. Monkey fancy-up his wheelchair? He certainly can with a plan and his trusty monkey wrench! / A very big elephant family has an enormous problem! Their van is too small to fit the members of their whole family! What can Mr. Monkey do to make sure everyone has a comfortable seat? First, he starts with a plan. Then, he gets to work! See how Mr. Monkey solves the problem!

programme.title: Carl's Car Wash
programme.sub-title: Officer Oona's Police Car / Harvey's Hot Dog Truck
programme.desc: A paint thief is on the loose and only Police Officer Oona can catch him! But in the middle of her investigation, she accidentally knocks some of the paint can evidence on the back of her police car! It's super duper messy! After Office Oona drops eight tokens into the token machine, she zips in and out of the car wash and gets back on the beat! That's what Carl calls a clean getaway! / Eugenie is about to enjoy a hot dog when she has trouble with the mustard bottle. Nothing's coming out! Harvey tells her to squeeze hard…and mustard gets all over the side of his truck! Carl analyzes the truck – it's a little messy – so Harvey pays only six tokens! Harvey is so happy that he offers Carl a hot dog and gives him the biggest one he has – from the top of his truck!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.sub-title: Big Ice-Cream for Little Bunny / Snapshot to Remember / Magic Eraser

But for some reason, the bunnies don't look like themselves in these snapshots. What is happening to the mysterious photo booth? / Iris throws a lesson of magical transformations and inattentive Hopper manages to come up with a very strange object - an unusual eraser. Now there are no barriers to his mischievous tricks!

programme.title: Lea & Pop
programme.sub-title: Down By The Bay / Drawing song / Five Little Ducks / Five Little Monkeys / Happy Birthday
programme.desc: Down by the Bay" is a traditional children's song. Your children will have fun when they watch this video for children and listen to the funny song. The best quality recordings for preschools children. A musical adventure, full of dancing songs, animals, and alphabet learning activities! Educational and entertaining preschool content. Kids love to learn simple songs. / Little Pop is learning how to draw a little house but also, he learns to count to ten, together with his friends. Learning and education are very important for children, but, when playing and learning at the same time, counting will be easier! Pop learns to count to ten, together with his musical friends. Fun nursery rhyme for young children to learn to count. / Lea has made a few new friends. Five little ducks are very playful and fun. This song is popular, is very catchy and is easy to memorize with repetitive lyrics. Five little ducks went swimming one day. Will they come home? Lea makes sure that all ducks are safe. Lea is very playful, she loves to dance, to sing and all the musical universe that surrounds her. / It's time to learn counting with Lea and Pop. Learn to count in a funny way with five little monkeys who are jumping on the bed. Best educational songs for kids to learn and have fun at the same time! The Room and the huge garden are the stages where the siblings and their Musical Animals perform the most popular nursery rhymes and children's songs. / Lea and her musical friends want to make a secret surprise to little Pop. It's Pop's birthday and everyone is excited. Everybody is preparing for this big surprise. Lovely decoration and delicious cake. Let's sing together this popular song for parties. Baby Songs with Lea and Pop are an excellent opportunity to introduce preschoolers and kindergarteners to a beautiful musical adventure.

programme.title: Cloudbabies

programme.title: Booba

programme.desc: Mommy says it's time for breakfast but baby John keeps singing that he wants to be big to eat a lot of cookies and walk around in his Dad's shoes!

programme.title: Blippi Wonders

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: What does it take to turn a regular journey into a great trip? One Bear, one travelling bag and... One Masha. programme.desc: Bernie searches the seabed for a weight to prime his catapult but a strange pumpkin follows him everywhere...Who's behind this prank squash that Bernie is scared of?

programme.title: Sewing
programme.desc: Learn to sew with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: It's fun to take and share selfie photos. Amy Tan gets selfies out of the camera and onto artful pages. Ashley Horton uses fancy frames to capture a bit of herself in her designs.Amy Tan has a tip for adding stitches to patterned paper. Julie Fei-Fan Balzer creates a fun photo series from every day activities.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: This episode features paint and ink techniques. First, Dina Wakley uses paint and ink to create a vibrant watercolor background for her page layout. Julie interviews Joe Rotella about his glass etching project. Then, Kathy Cano Murillo tie dyes fabric to use as a background for her page layout. Last, Julie creates a tie dye look with a watercolor technique.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.sub-title: Get Creative with Resin and Wire
programme.desc: Mixed media artist Susan Lenart Kazmer demonstrates making faux stones with glass glitter, inclusions and resin, and then she shows cold surface work to mimic enameling on metal. Today's Beading Lesson is on knotting with leather.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Sometime all we need is a walk outside to jump start our creativity. A simple breath of fresh air clears our head and allows to ideas to form. Nature all by itself is inspiring. Today Nealay Patel uses the branches of a tree to prompt a design for a necklace. Then leaves motivate Candie Cooper to create fringed leather leaf earrings. Finally, Tammy Honaman has peyote with a twist.

programme.title: The Big Baking Experiment
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: A classic style sometimes can use a change whether for fashion or fit. Fit expert Kathleen Cheetham teaches how to create a back yoke on a blouse to eliminate multiple darts or change to a more casual look. Then, it's a lesson on sleeves for your Little Black Dress with Angela Wolf. Finally, Gretchen Hirsch alters a favorite pattern by adding a flounce for a fashion flare.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: The Industrial Revolution was in full swing and women ventured beyond their homes into the workplace and politics. Angela Wolf creates a luxurious kimono duster inspired by those worn over long, full skirts and dresses. Kathy McMakin uses today's machines to create a precious heirloom baby bonnet you'll treasure.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: Provisional Cast-On, Cable Cast-On & Split Neckline
programme.desc: Since when do knitters use crochet hooks? Find out how to work the provisional cast-on, cable cast-on, and more during the first Novel-T check in!

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: Hold onto your needles! Tracie and Jodi, are here to dish out fresh fiber inspiration. From project picks to wooly good gossip, things are about to get super knitty… and maybe just a little nutty.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: We're exploring shapes today. Shape is what gives an object its form -- they can be geometric like squares or triangles -- or a shape can be anamorphic or free form. We begin with a Japanese printing technique called gyotaka to make fish shaped prints. Then, we're making a homemade hula hoop. The next page of our art journal is using the shape of your fingerprint to create faces to express your mood. Finally, mix and match shapes to create monster cubes.

programme.title: Five-Course Photo
programme.desc: Learn photography with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Creative Cake Design presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Rachael Teufel demonstrates how to use an acetate template to create an underwater wrap design using buttercream icing. She shares her tips for achieving a clean design on your acetate before transferring it to your cake. This technique can be used to create any design you choose, making it a versatile method for any cake decorator.

programme.title: Creative Cake Design presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Transform your cake into an adorable polar bear using modeling chocolate and fondant. Rachael Teufel shows you how to use a simple template to cut out shapes for your polar bear, as well as some basic sculpting techniques that are easy enough for beginners.

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: -Cordless drills are a staple in many woodworking shops and deserve a dedicated storage stand. George Vondriska shows you how to make your own cordless drill stand, fully equipped with a power strip for easy charging, plus storage drawers for tips and bits. This project is great for practicing biscuit joinery and hand tool work.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Explore design from a fresh perspective. Free-motion quilt artist Christina Cameli echo quilts and contrasts curves and lines to create new designs. Art historian and quilter Allison Evans joins modern quilt activist Heather Grant to discuss charity quilting events. Quilt innovator Jacquie Gering quilts with gentle curves.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This practical and cute quilted zipper pouch is one of Angela's favorite projects yet, because it skips the piecing and gets straight to the quilting! In this episode, she shares three quilting designs every quilter should know: ribbon candy, serpentine lines and the paisley feather, while making a small, easy quilting project for beginners that only requires two fat quarters to make!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Are you a "slow and steady" quilter or more of a "forget perfect, finish fast" quilter like Angela? Tonight, she uses templates and block piecing with LOTS of triangles to create an out-of-this-world ombré quilt. Plus, she shares some handy tips for quilting with rulers.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: This season features a wardrobe of athletic or everyday wear with Angela Wolf. To kick off athletic wear, Angela demonstrates a yoga top with mesh color-blocked inserts. Then, Emily Thompson has the perfect pattern for a workout skirt for kids featuring shorts underneath.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Be one of a kind when you take your favorite pattern and alter, change or rearrange the pieces for a new look. Kay Whitt is first with a wrap dress – the key to this look is choosing different fabrics for the bodice trim. Then meet Sarah Gunn, known for her tunics and altering the necklines to fit your style. We finish with Angela Wolf and a lace trimmed tank. She will be featuring all different tank alterations from a basic pattern this season.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Bend it, twist it, shape it, wear it. Jewelry designer Sandra Lupo warms up by bending and shaping sheet metal with a tool she invented. Then, she enhances the designs with patterns, texture and color. Host and designer Katie Hacker make a quick and easy charm bracelet to cool down.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: In the hands of an artist – even the simplest materials take on a new life. We begin with stone cabochons. Then artist Ashley Bunting uses jump rings and crimp tubes to make a simple chainmaille style chain with the most basic of materials. Then Katie creates a prayer mantra bracelet inspired by ancient art. Finally, learn the basics of fine silver metal clay and torch firing with artist Tammy Honaman and complete a necklace using just a pendant and simple leather cording.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Make the most of your stamps or create new ones. Julie Fei-Fan Balzer carves her own stamps. May Flaum makes a stamped image pop off the page. Christine Drumheller has a handy gluing tip for clips and charms. Cheryl Boglioli stamps contemporary positive and negative images using gelatin plates.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: Books are not just for reading! Tool expert Joe Rotella cuts a niche in a book to create a planter. Craft metal book hinges with designer Mary Hettmansperger and Mou Saha makes vintage books into colorful art journals. Host Julie Fei Fan Balzer has a tip for creating a charming little book necklace.

programme.title: Chemo Caps
programme.desc: Learn to knit with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Chemo Caps
programme.desc: Learn to knit with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Don't try this on your turkey! Learn everything you ever wanted to know about basting as Angela tackles a simple four-patch design with complex sashing.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This practical and cute quilted zipper pouch is one of Angela's favorite projects yet, because it skips the piecing and gets straight to the quilting! In this episode, she shares three quilting designs every quilter should know: ribbon candy, serpentine lines and the paisley feather, while making a small, easy quilting project for beginners that only requires two fat quarters to make!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This week Angela is preparing to host a dinner for quilters, so of course, she has to quilt up a few placemats!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This week, Angela's quilting a stash-busting table runner that's perfect for entertaining (plus, quick to whip up!), and sharing her favorite tips for throwing the perfect party!

programme.title: Baking & Cooking
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Slow it down with cookie decorating.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Take it slow with this model railroad tour.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: In this episode of Man About Cake, we learn that shiny is a color, and edible lace isn't as difficult as it looks.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: This cake's got sole. JJR demonstrates fashion fondant techniques, piped stringwork and tops it off with a custom sugar shoe topper.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Marble cakes rock. In this episode our Cake Slayer demystifies the marbled fondant technique and constructs a fully marbleized cake (from the inside out!). If only granite had chocolate swirls like these.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Geometric cutout cakes are all the rage. JJR takes on tiled fondant and custom toppers for a modern kids' birthday cake design (sprinkles included).

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Celebrate a love that's out of this world with Joshua John Russell's "cosmic love" illustrated cake!

programme.title: Jazz Basics 1
programme.desc: Join Nick in his first Jazz Basics class that focuses on weight shifts and working your feet through the floor. Practice using your plié as you take up space and travel through each exercise sequence.

programme.title: Jazz Basics 2
programme.desc: Nick's second Jazz Basics class covers direction changes, coordination, and staying grounded in your movement. Work on your pas de bourrées, jazz lunge, and a short phrase you will see later in Nick's jazz combination!

programme.title: Yoga For Holistic Health: Yoga Sculpt
programme.sub-title: Yoga For Holistic Health: Yoga Sculpt

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: The earth is full of wonderful creatures. Jenny Barnett-Rohrs crafts simple animals that are easily adaptable and molds a robot mouse. Artist Franz Spohn draws creatures that are just like us – or not. Jenny uses glow-in-the-dark clay to craft a spooky-sweet charm for your backpack.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Imagine a world all in black and white -- it would be pretty boring. Today we're going to look at some ways to use color. The first project is an art supply holder. Brightly colored cord is knotted together to form the hanger. Batik a monster tank top using a color resist technique. Today's art journal page is an experiment on color mixing to create funky printed leaves. The color wheel is the primer for how to mix color but it creates a beautiful work of art when you add glitter for our last project.

programme.title: Photography
programme.desc: Learn photography with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Learn to quilt with CraftsyTV

programme.title: AKC.tv
programme.desc: AKC.TV is the digital network for all things DOG! AKC.TV, powered by the American Kennel Club, brings over 135 years of dog expertise to dog lovers the world over. Featuring dog related programming 24/7, as well as an on-demand library of world class dog events, training and health tips for you and your pup, and original series created especially for you and your best friend.

Featuring dog related programming 24/7, as well as an on-demand library of world class dog events, training and health tips for you and your pup, and original series created especially for you and your best friend.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Mississippi, Alabama & Arkansas"
programme.desc: A hurricane in the south forces Lisa to change direction. We meet southern Van Lifers living under the radar in a state where the lifestyle is judged harshly. Tragically, Lisa’s story takes a heavy turn when she discovers that her father has died.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Texas"
programme.desc: A colourful graffiti artist in Austin shares her story of loss with Lisa and gives her a tarot reading. We travel to rural Texas to overnight with Jupiter: an outspoken, non-binary person of colour, living in their vintage RV while studying law.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Arizona"
programme.desc: Lisa spontaneously joins a sober dance party on a mountain top in Sedona, and meets spiritual Van Lifers who have dramatically changed their entire existence, including former NFL player Joe Hawley, and a transformative breathwork practitioner.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Utah"
programme.desc: Lisa heads to Utah, the ultimate playground for Van Life adrenaline junkies: aka Dirt Bags. Base jumper Derrick shows that by confronting death, it helps us appreciate life. We meet a solo female traveler who challenges Lisa by taking her bouldering.

programme.title: The Classy Chef S1 - "Spiced-Rubbed Seared Sea Bass"
programme.desc: Chef Natasha tantalizes soca artist Nailah Blackman with culinary dream destination by creating a Greek-inspired dish.

programme.title: Chasing the Sun S2 - "Japan"
programme.desc: Land of the rising sun and the fastest trains in the world that takes us from skateboarding to drag queens and one of the last remaining old-world jazz bars. We meet a chalk artist and a sculpture who makes art with a bite, aka: real teeth.

programme.title: Chasing the Sun S2 - "Hong Kong"
programme.desc: Whether street art and tofu or Bruce Lee and the Star Ferry, Hong Kong is a City overflowing with art and history. Stephen learns about the secrets from the locals and the expats.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "East Timor"
programme.desc: Dave Reyne explores the capitol of East Timor’s Dili, and Alana enjoy a serenade on the river

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "Bangkok"
programme.desc: Alana finds a unique way to explore Budapest and Scotty enjoys a food crawl through Bangkok.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "Mad Max museum"
programme.desc: Scotty visits the Mad Max museum in Silverton and David treks to one of Indonesia's spectacular sleeping giants

programme.title: A Taste of Travel S2 - "Komodo dragon"
programme.desc: David gets close but not too close to the Komodo dragon and I try out a local delicacy.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Tbilisi"
programme.desc: Cody discovers the unknown beauty of Tbilisi exploring abandoned Cold War bomb shelters, a derelict weather station and an abandoned cable car station.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Nantes"
programme.desc: Josh and ultimate traveler Lexie Limitless explore Nantes on a mechanical elephant and inline skates, and discover a deserted mine and a noble house.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Thessaloniki"
programme.desc: Cody goes off the beaten path in Thessaloniki, Greece. He runs over wagons at a train cemetery, explores a factory with drones and dives to a shipwreck.

programme.title: Epic Exploring: Going Local S2 - "Ruhr District"
programme.desc: Exploring in the industrial Ruhr District in Germany, Josh discovers abandoned steel and mining factories and experiences a miner’s life underneath the ground.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Mississippi, Alabama & Arkansas"
programme.desc: A hurricane in the south forces Lisa to change direction. We meet southern Van Lifers living under the radar in a state where the lifestyle is judged harshly. Tragically, Lisa’s story takes a heavy turn when she discovers that her father has died.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Texas"
programme.desc: A colourful graffiti artist in Austin shares her story of loss with Lisa and gives her a tarot reading. We travel to rural Texas to overnight with Jupiter: an outspoken, non-binary person of colour, living in their vintage RV while studying law.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Arizona"
programme.desc: Lisa spontaneously joins a sober dance party on a mountain top in Sedona, and meets spiritual Van Lifers who have dramatically changed their entire existence, including former NFL player Joe Hawley, and a transformative breathwork practitioner.

programme.title: My Van Life S1 - "Utah"
programme.desc: Lisa heads to Utah, the ultimate playground for Van Life adrenaline junkies: aka Dirt Bags. Base jumper Derrick shows that by confronting death, it helps us appreciate life. We meet a solo female traveler who challenges Lisa by taking her bouldering.

programme.title: Chasing the Sun S2 - "South Korea"
programme.desc: Explore a place where its illegal to be a tattoo artist and the people in a rapidly changing culture. A place where a GPS limitations mean the possibilities to get lost in music and art are endless.

programme.title: The Classy Chef S1 - "Spiced-Rubbed Seared Sea Bass"
programme.desc: Chef Natasha tantalizes soca artist Nailah Blackman with culinary dream destination by creating a Greek-inspired dish.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S6 - "From Roadrunner to Superbird"
programme.desc: Redstreak tires are put on the RoadRunner. The winchester gray ‘Cuda is finished and Mark is confronted by Human Resources.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S6 - "Roaming the Restorations"
programme.desc: Will and Mark argue over color tints. Alyssa helps out in the shop and Goldberg’s GTX goes on a road trip.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S6 - "Taming a 1971 Challenger R/T"
programme.desc: Alyssa and Dave restore the RoadRunner’s heaterbox. Buck checks in on his Challenger and Will and Mike play a prank on Mark.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S6 - "Priviledge To Drive a '68 GTX Convertible"
programme.sub-title: Priviledge To Drive a '68 GTX Convertible
programme.desc: Will paints the Phantom ‘Cuda. Royal and Mark take a walk down memory lane and Alyssa test drives Goldberg’s GTX.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "Los Angeles"
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie goes to Hollywood arriving in a million dollar V12 Ferrari. In the ‘City of Angels’ Alex is brought into contact with the Brotherhood of Racing, a community of drivers looking to create safe racing conditions for amateurs.

programme.title: Close Proximity S1 - "Irwindale California"
programme.desc: After a win in Texas, Matt Field and his team head to Irwindale, California with renewed hope and in high spirits.

programme.title: Close Proximity S1 - "Long Beach California"
programme.desc: Matt Field and his and his solid team of experts head down to Long Beach, California to begin the Formula Drift Championship series.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga S1 - "To Hell and Back"
programme.desc: Last year's champion, Erik Miller defends his title. While 2nd place finisher, Jason Scherer, will be one of the many top challengers aiming to beat him.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S6 - "Elephant In A '69"
programme.desc: The Ghouls install the HEMI in the sea foam turquoise RoadRunner. The dash is installed in Torino’s GTX and Stan Lynch comes calling.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S6 - "From Roadrunner to Superbird"
programme.desc: Redstreak tires are put on the RoadRunner. The winchester gray ‘Cuda is finished and Mark is confronted by Human Resources.

programme.sub-title: Kings of Fi$h -- E10 Hooked: The Kings Take the Kitchen

programme.title: Bobby's Kitchen Basics Episode 1
programme.desc: We will feature three easy meal prep recipes. BBQ Chicken Meal, Turkey Kebobs and Quinoa Fried Rice with sticky glazed chicken.

programme.title: Bobby's Kitchen Basics Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features two easy meal prep recipes: Salisbury Steak and Beef Enchiladas. So easy and affordable!

programme.sub-title: Gabriel and Abes Excellent Road Trip

programme.title: Gabriels California Road Trip
programme.desc: Join Gabriel driving down Highway 1 in northern California, the beautiful Pacific Coast Highway.

programme.title: Cooking With Ro Episode 01
programme.desc: Ro shows us recipes using chicken hearts and gizzards for both pets and people.

programme.title: Cooking With Ro Episode 09
programme.desc: Ro cooks up tortillas and Middle Eastern french toast that both pups and people will enjoy.

programme.title: Joe Robinet - Adventures in the Outdoors
programme.desc: In this episode, Joe is waiting for his sea plane to arrive but a big storm complicates things a bit.

programme.desc: Pizza is a favorite food in the Coblentz household. Marks dad stops in to show him how to make a few different types of pizza dough, plus give him some pointers on how to assemble a delicious homemade pizza pie.

programme.title: Making A Chef S1 Ep5 -- Try Not to be Corny
programme.sub-title: Making A Chef S1 Ep5 -- Try Not to be Corny

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.desc: Finding inspiration to fight cancer calls upon the courage and an immense determination to soldier through the most challenging days. This arduous journey also requires support and love from friends and family. Michael Cramer was gifted with all these necessary ingredients to forge ahead, not only from a family who loves him but especially from a mother whose encouragement strengthened her son through his darkest moments. Here is Michael's remarkable story about a mother's love, his undying resilience, and the crucial lessons he learned about giving back the gift of survival.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.sub-title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2
programme.desc: Lung cancer diagnoses for young, non-smoking individuals are a growing trend. But that didn't intimidate the athletic and courageous lung cancer patient, 21-year-old Jill Costello. Jill's fighting spirit and her desire to help find a cure and eradicate the stigma that only smokers contracted the disease would eventually define her legacy.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.sub-title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E3
programme.desc: Hank Baskett was given the grim diagnosis of stage 4 lung cancer almost ten years ago. At the time his thoughts were not of himself but of how he was going to tell his family. In episode 3 of Hope is Here we meet Hank and his family and learn how he was able to push forward towards health with a hopeful attitude and mission that his cancer journey would be, in his words, a joyful one.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.sub-title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E4
programme.desc: Gina Hollenbeck is positive about life. Every day she lives with an optimistic desire to overcome and thrive despite a stage 4 lung cancer diagnosis. As a young mother of two boys, she forges ahead towards a vibrant and meaningful journey with a mission to help find a cure for not only herself but for others who suffer from this deadly disease.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series
programme.sub-title: Yoga Is - Day 8 Harmony Janu Sirasana
programme.desc: Invite the mind into harmony as you take it nice and easy with today’s posture, Janu Sirsasana.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series
programme.sub-title: Yoga Is - Day 9 Kindness Marichasana A
programme.desc: Invite kindness into your body, using Marichasana A as a framework for integrating tenderness into your practice.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series
programme.sub-title: Yoga Is - Day 10 Happiness Baddha Konasana
programme.desc: You can be happy for no reason at all… Happiness can be our natural state. Start day 10 with attention at the heart center and the recollection of an uplifting memory. Holding on to that feeling, move into practice with a warm up rooted in backbending and sun salutations. Next, follow Kino through through a hip opening sequence. As we approach today’s pinnacle pose, Baddha Konasana, remember that there is no need for the body to be in any particular place. Practice acceptance and happiness here and now.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series
programme.desc: Day 11 of the challenge is centered around a quality that is perhaps the very essence of being a yogi: Compassion

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series
programme.sub-title: Yoga Is - Day 12 Gratitude Parsvakonasana A
programme.desc: Today is day 12 of our challenge and the lesson is built around the standing posture Parsvakonasana A.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series
programme.sub-title: Yoga Is - Day 14 Joy Happy Baby
programme.desc: For day 14 we’ll use Happy Baby pose to explore what yoga truly is.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series
programme.sub-title: Yoga Is - Day 13 Patience Marichasana C
programme.desc: Day 13 of our challenge brings us an opportunity to understand patience through the twisting posture Marichasana C.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series
programme.sub-title: Yoga Is - Day 15 Mindfulness Trikonasana A
programme.desc: Today we go deeper into understanding what yoga is as we explore mindfulness and the pose Trikonasana.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.sub-title: The Aware Show: Robert Thurman - Wisdom is Bliss
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Professor Robert Thurman, the preeminent scholar and interpreter of Tibetan Buddhist philosophy for the modern world, who believes that Wisdom is Bliss and in fact, that’s the name of his latest book. Thurman is a very close friend of HH Dalai Lama and today he discusses deep ideas about mindfulness and presence and leads us on a joyful exploration into the nature of reality through Buddha’s threefold curriculum.

programme.title: House Hackers
programme.desc: Find out which contestant is named the winner and becomes Brian’s new business partner.

programme.title: The Nature of Reality
programme.sub-title: The Nature of Reality: Union with Yourself
programme.desc: The essential nature of the physical world is that it's not physical. The essential nature of the material world is that it's not material. As Rumi says, “We come spinning out of nothingness scattering stars like dust.”

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency
programme.sub-title: Section 1: The Addiction Frequency & The Power of Breath
programme.desc: Breathing is the single most important thing we do. Addiction is characterized by a sense of lack, of missing something. And when you breathe poorly, like when anxious or angry, you’re caught up in your head and aren’t breathing well and that sends a signal to your body that perpetuates the addiction frequency. Deep, long breathing is how we interrupt this pattern.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency
programme.sub-title: Section 2: Importance of Morning & Evening Practices
programme.desc: If you take care of the bookends of the day, the rest of the day will take care of itself. It’s such a powerful idea for people to understand that when we wake up in the morning, most people wake up with anxiety, fear, and negativity. So, we need to do something right away to set ourselves straight, to create the conditions for the best day possible, regardless of the circumstances that we're facing in the outside world.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency
programme.desc: Addiction is felt and experienced in the mind. The mind is a terrible master but a wonderful servant. We must understand its functions as it’s an important aspect of addiction recovery and learning how to thrive. So, the key question is this: How do you get the mind to serve the heart, rather than staying trapped in serving the mind? Only heightened awareness can end the inner war.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency
programme.sub-title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency: Q&A
programme.desc: Questios and Answers for the series, Break Out of the Addiction Frequency.

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life
programme.sub-title: Vinyasa for Life: Easing into Back Bending
programme.desc: Establish long term success for your practice by learning about one of the most crucial body parts in yoga—your spine. In this class Schuyler teaches you how to backbend safely, followed by three practical applications. Class ends with a soothing restorative posture. Body awareness never felt so good.

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life
programme.sub-title: Vinyasa for Life: From Cobra to Camel
programme.desc: This vinyasa class applies what you learned in Day 1 so you can play with classic backbends and steady transitions. Schuyler guides you through Cobra (Bhujangasana), Locust (Salabhasana), and Camel (Ustrasana), finishing off with Bridge (Setu Bandhasana) and spine-clearing twists. Take it slow and build strength!

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life
programme.sub-title: Vinyasa for Life: Foundations of Forward Bending
programme.desc: In this class, you begin with a brief anatomy of forward folds, followed by a dive into Standing Forward Fold (Uttanasana) and Wide-Legged Forward Fold (Prasarita Padottanasana). Regardless of your flexibility, this lab is designed to help you to safely find length through the entire back chain of your body.

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life
programme.sub-title: Vinyasa for Life: Forward Bending for Forward Thinking
programme.desc: Use what you learned in Day 4 to stretch the hamstrings and your backbody safely and effectively. Bring attention to your spine in Downward Facing Dog (Adho Mukha Svanasana) and Intense Side Stretch (Parsvottanasana), before working on Hand-to-Big-Toe Pose (Padangusthasana) with a strap. Finish in a supported backbend to counter your diligent forward folding.

programme.title: Tap Into Healing
programme.desc: When a healing crisis enters our life, it may show up as physical ailments, an overactive mind, exhaustion and a plethora of other imbalances. This can be very overwhelming — to the extent where we do not know where to start. In Day 1, we look at our health issues in body, mind, and spirit with open eyes, and start to clear out the overwhelm.

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee
programme.desc: Over the course of the next 10 days, you're going to get the full scoop on, well, poop but plenty more such as the role that our nutrition, nervous system, and hormones play in our gut health. What happens in the gut does not stay in the gut, and we will discuss how important the gut-brain connection is for our health and wellness optimization.

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee
programme.desc: For day 2, we'll look at the connection between the gut and the brain. We'll also practice mindful eating.

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee
programme.sub-title: Day 3: IBS and other Gastrointestinal Issues
programme.desc: Today, we dive into the most commonly diagnosed functional GI disorder, Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS)

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee
programme.desc: For day 4, we learn about common GI disorders and how to test for them.

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee
programme.desc: Healthy gut, healthy brain. For day 5, we learn how certain GI disorders affect brain functionality.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.desc: In the following lesson, we'll discover how the ego mind influences both our way of thinking and our relationships. We'll also identify the unconscious barriers we've built that cause us to form these judgments and thoughts. That's where the problem is, and that's where the solution lies.

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare
programme.desc: How do you know if you're one of the 90% that's lacking in something essential? Let’s talk about the tests you can use to find out, and more importantly, what to do about it.

programme.title: The Wellness Master Class
programme.sub-title: The Wellness Master Class: Cultivating Joy
programme.desc: We experience two types of joy. One is momentary, when something funny happens or a nice word is said in passing and we laugh or smile - for a bit, we’re filled with joy. The other is long term and lasting, sustained by gratitude and a life of meaning and purpose. If we’re waiting on joy to enter our life, we’re not living as connected or congruent as we could be.

programme.title: The Wellness Master Class
programme.sub-title: Brendon Burchard - The Wellness Masterclass - Presence
programme.desc: The way we relate to our past and future can have major repercussions for how we engage with our present. When we are consumed with worry over how things went or how they will go, it’s impossible to fully engage with the here and now.

programme.title: Ecstatic Breathwork
programme.sub-title: Entering the Heart: Cultivating a Chosen Feeling State
programme.desc: In today’s practice, we focus on opening the heart and dissolving the layers of conditioning that keeps us stuck. Any overwhelming experience, positive or negative, doesn't get digested in the moment but gets stored in the body, but the breath can clear it out.

programme.title: Abundant Joy with Scott Schwenk
programme.desc: Welcome to Abundant Joy! Remember, love isn't given or taken. It's an expression of the great Self, the one consciousness that animates all life.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.desc: Today, we take a close look at who we really are in order to recognize our purpose, understand our intentions, and recognize our true worth in this world.

programme.title: Abundant Joy with Scott Schwenk
programme.desc: This toolbox episode will teach you how to listen, sit for meditation, set your manifestations, and find your mantra.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare
programme.sub-title: Day 1: Health Care vs. Sick Care
programme.desc: Today, we talk about a revolutionary approach to health called Functional Medicine, and how you can have a healthy doctor-patient relationship.

programme.title: The Wellness Master Class

programme.desc: Today we learn how to ask those better questions and use the answers to achieve more for ourselves and our community.

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare
programme.desc: Today we start with a discussion of reference ranges, and how what medicine considers as “normal” may not be optimal for your health

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.sub-title: Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
programme.desc: Today's lesson is a bit of a reality check, as we'll begin to question the current way we look at relationships, romantic or not. How we see ourselves and our relationship to God influences our view of our relationships with other people. Today we're going to examine that view from a place of love.

programme.title: The Nature of Reality
programme.sub-title: The Nature of Reality: Dreaming Reality
programme.desc: You dream every night, and whether or not you remember a dream, it's still an experience you have. Usually you will dismiss it in the morning, saying, “It was just a dream,” meaning it was not real. And the reason it's not real is that you look back and the dream is not here, it's over. So a dream by definition is transient, evanescent, ephemeral, ungraspable.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.sub-title: Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships
programme.desc: A miracle happens when you stop thinking with fear and start thinking with love. Your greatest power lies in your mind. To establish stronger connections, you need to go into every situation requesting to be an instrument of love. When you approach your interactions with love, you'll begin to have more miraculous relationships.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.desc: In the following lesson, we'll discover how the ego mind influences both our way of thinking and our relationships. We'll also identify the unconscious barriers we've built that cause us to form these judgments and thoughts. That's where the problem is, and that's where the solution lies.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: As humans, we are constantly struggling between the poles of what we think we want and what is. When we lose touch with the truth of what is, we create and compound our suffering. What narratives are you constructing? Are they in conflict with the truth of the situation? Are you struggling with what is?

programme.title: Ecstatic Breathwork
programme.sub-title: Entering the Heart: Cultivating a Chosen Feeling State
programme.desc: In today’s practice, we focus on opening the heart and dissolving the layers of conditioning that keeps us stuck. Any overwhelming experience, positive or negative, doesn't get digested in the moment but gets stored in the body, but the breath can clear it out.

programme.title: The Work of Byron Katie
programme.desc: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?

programme.title: Hacking Your Healthcare
programme.desc: How do you know if you're one of the 90% that's lacking in something essential? Let’s talk about the tests you can use to find out, and more importantly, what to do about it.

programme.title: The Nature of Reality
programme.sub-title: The Nature of Reality: The Science of Reality
programme.desc: What is real? How do we know it's real, and how does that deeper understanding of reality help us fulfill our dreams, desires, and intentions? So let's go for it.

programme.title: Live Fearlessly with Anita Moorjani
programme.desc: Today, we take a close look at who we really are in order to recognize our purpose, understand our intentions, and recognize our true worth in this world.

programme.title: The Wellness Master Class
programme.desc: In this course we’ll open an earnest dialogue, asking tough questions and taking a comprehensive inventory of where we are right now. Look at this course as a way to move beyond reactive treatments and instead be strategic and proactive.

programme.title: Break Out of the Addiction Frequency
programme.desc: Addiction is felt and experienced in the mind. The mind is a terrible master but a wonderful servant. We must understand its functions as it’s an important aspect of addiction recovery and learning how to thrive. So, the key question is this: How do you get the mind to serve the heart, rather than staying trapped in serving the mind? Only heightened awareness can end the inner war.

programme.title: Vinyasa for Life
programme.sub-title: Vinyasa for Life: Forward Bending for Forward Thinking
programme.desc: Use what you learned in Day 4 to stretch the hamstrings and your backbody safely and effectively. Bring attention to your spine in Downward Facing Dog (Adho Mukha Svanasana) and Intense Side Stretch (Parsvottanasana), before working on Hand-to-Big-Toe Pose (Padangusthasana) with a strap. Finish in a supported backbend to counter your diligent forward folding.

programme.title: Ecstatic Breathwork

programme.desc: Above all, these reports are an opportunity for Yann Arthus-Bertrand to take stock of the planet and denounce certain human behaviors that are at the root of dramatic, even irreversible, environmental and climatic degradation. Off to Tokyo, then Kenya, to an animal sanctuary. Then on to Mount Fuji to learn how to live there, and all the plastic that clogs up the seas. Reports will focus on everyday products, chosen for their destructive production practices for both people and the environment.

programme.title: In the eyes of a champ - Season 1 - Cross-country skiing - Norway
programme.desc: Martine Ek Hagen is a Norwegian cross-country skier. She was a member of the national team and the junior team for five years. Today, her professional career is over but she still loves to ski and challenge herself for fun. She has set herself a daunting challenge: to reproduce the incredible ski trek of 2 soldiers featured on a famous Norwegian painting.

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 3 - USA: The end of oil - Part 1
programme.sub-title: USA: The end of oil - Part 1
programme.desc: "The end of oil" is the amazing story of a raw material which has revolutionized man's life in just a century. But today, oil reserves are depleting. In his crazy race for always more production, Man didn't manage to preserve this precious energy that took million years for the Earth to give out. To tell the adventure of oil, Yann Arthus-Bertrand and his team went to the United States, the country which depends the most on black gold. At the start of the 21st century, it is now urgent to realize that oil resources are limited. It's today that we have to act and get organized, in order to prepare the new era to come. While all our economies are based on the petrol barrel's price, we'll have to learn to do without oil within 20, 30 or 100 years. What will be the consequences? What are the solutions at stake? This new episode of Earth From Above attempts to answer these questions. From China to Benin, including Azerbaijan, Belgium and Canada, Earth From Above takes us on a new trip around the world, in search of black gold.

programme.title: Fresh Yoga - Season 3 - The Essential
programme.desc: Supreme happiness does not come from having it or from outer success but from the embodiment of our inner being. This inner being then gives us access to futile pleasure, pleasant experience, the very consequence of the embodiment of inner happiness. Our philosophy reveals aspirations, desires, while letting go of superficial needs. The return to our essence allows us to become aware of what we really need and not to waste time with what is inessential to us. This session gives us the opportunity to anchor ourselves in the essence, by feeling our balance and reactivating it. Perched in the trees, Katy was inspired by the force of the simplicity of Nature to create standing postures, revealing our potential, then giving us the strength to achieve our dreams and achieve what we really want.

programme.title: Fresh Yoga - Season 3 - Love
programme.desc: The very essence of mindful living. Through the ancient teaching of yoga and its tantric philosophy derived from Kahsmir Shaviism, we have the opportunity to recognize the essence of life. As Katy often says, let's relearn how to live in conscience, to wake up by saying thank you for a new day that is offered to us, to recognise our individual gifts, respecting all beings and all things. We are all interconnected individuals, coming from the same source, like a drop that is part of of the ocean of consciousness. This episode contains all the magic of Indonesian children, having kept all the purity of being, evolving in a natural environment, in tune with Nature and respect for our system. They know how to LOVE: to love oneself and to love others, without judgment. Their gaze simply filled with gratitude, offering real exchanges. Exchanges of simplicity, Love, life. It's up to us to follow their example. Only the internal rules exist, we come back to listening to our body by unusual movements, by opening the heart, the senses, by removing our blinders and in ourselves focusing on what we have deep inside our cells: THE NEED TO BE ALIVE.

His experiences have taught him that the only way one can truly change the world is to raise the consciousness of humanity, and this actually starts within ourselves.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey’s south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we’ll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It’s all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League kicks off its 2014 season in Martinique.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E13 | The Man With The Biggest Stack
programme.desc: Brad Garrett joins our table at Seminole Hard Rock in Hollywood, FL. Can he hold his own against the pros? He's certainly got a big enough chip stack! Featuring Brad Garrett, Jennifer Tilly, Jason Mercier, Kyle Bowker, Brandon Adams, Ryan Fee, and Eric Wasserson

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E14 | You Are A Mother #%$@&r!
programme.desc: Jennifer Tilly goes full Jennifer TILTy as we conclude our filming at Seminole Hard Rock at Hollywood, FL. Featuring Eric Wasserson, Esther Taylor, Ryan Fee, Jennifer Tilly, Jason Mercier, Kyle Bowker, and Michael Laake

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E15 | Winterhalter Is Coming
programme.desc: We corral seven of California's poker elite at our cash game table hosted by Thunder Valley Casino Resort in Lincoln, CA. Featuring Lee Markholt, Kelly Winterhalter, David Sands, Phil Hellmuth, Harlan Karnofsky, Rep Porter, Keith McNair, and Bob Mather

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E16 | Quick Sands
programme.desc: Our cash game continues from the beautiful Thunder Valley Casino Resort in Lincoln, CA. Featuring Lee Markholt, Kelly Winterhalter, David Sands, Phil Hellmuth, Jerry Utke, Matt Glantz, Rep Porter, Keith McNair, and Bob Mather

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E17 | Top Golf
programme.desc: We begin our second day of filming cash game action at Thunder Valley Casino Resort in Lincoln, CA, plus our players take a visit to a Top Golf facility to show off their driving chops. Featuring Matt Glantz, Tom Schneider, Kelly Winterhalter, Brad Garrett, Tony Bracy, Phil Hellmuth, and Harlan Karnofsky

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E18 | Way Down In The Valley
programme.desc: We conclude our epic cash game from Thunder Valley Casino in Lincoln, CA. Featuring Brad Garrett, Phil Hellmuth, Lee Markholt, Tom Schneider, Kelly Winterhalter, Tony Bracy, Rep Porter, and Jed Hoffman

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E19 | P.O.W.
programme.desc: Phil Laak invents new poker terms during our first visit to Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Joe Cada, Maria Ho, Greg Mueller, Greg Merson, Phil Hellmuth, Bill Lee, Liv Boeree, and Phil Laak

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E20 | Heckmuth
programme.desc: We get some epic Hellmuth rants in this episode from Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Joe Cada, Maria Ho, Greg Mueller, Phil Hellmuth, Brandon Cantu, Bill Lee, Liv Boeree, and Phil Laak

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E21 | Pass The Eight Ball
programme.desc: The outlook is good for our players as we begin our second day of filming at The Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas Nevada. Featuring Jim Carroll, Craig Casino, Stan Jablonksi, Jared Jaffee, Mario Orozco, Richard Roeper, and Brandon Cantu

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E22 | Not Live From Las Vegas
programme.desc: We close out the second day of our series from The Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada with the best hands from the night. Featuring Jim Carroll, Craig Casino, Stan Jablonksi, Jared Jaffee, Mario Orozco, Richard Roeper, Matt Glantz, Mike Dentale, and Brandon Cantu

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E23 | Maybe I Just Hit Quads
programme.desc: We shake up the cast at our table as we begin our third day of filming from The Golden Nugget in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Alan Richardson, Ryan Fee, Kyle Bowker, Jennifer Tilly, Cindy Kerslake, Bryn Kenney, and Esther Taylor

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E24 | Panning For Gold
programme.desc: Our players try and sift for those last few nuggets as the night winds down on our visit to The Golden Nugget Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada. Featuring Alan Richardson, Ryan Fee, Kyle Bowker, Jennifer Tilly, Cindy Kerslake, Bryn Kenney, and Esther Taylor

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E25 | Poker Night In Canada!
programme.desc: We team up with our friends at partypoker to make our first trip to Canada! Playground Poker Club in Montreal is host to our high-stakes cash game, played by luminaries from the US, Canada, and the UK. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Francois Safieddine, Ouri Ohayon, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E26 | A Playground For Poker
programme.desc: The pros at partypoker sling chips at nose-bleed stakes with their friends at Playground Poker Club in Montreal. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Francois Safieddine, Ouri Ohayon, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E27 | Mauvais Coup
programme.desc: There are some wicked turn outs for the partypoker pros as the poker at Playground Poker Club in Montreal winds down on the first day of our visit. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E28 | partypoker Poker Party
programme.desc: We begin our second day at Playground Poker Club in Montreal, Quebec, and the pros from partypoker face off against some of the best players in North America. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E29 | Montreal Nights
programme.desc: Our second day of filming at Playground Poker Club draws to a close as the pros from partypoker try to draw to a straight. Featuring Antonio Esfandiari, Sam Trickett, Jeff Gross, Lauren Roberts, Rob Yong, and John Krpan.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E30 | Glantzing Blows
programme.desc: Poker Night in America Ambassador Matt Glantz joins the partypoker table at Playground Poker Club in Montreal to see how he fares against poker luminaries from Canada and the UK. Featuring Matt Glantz, John Duthie, Mike Dentale, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E31 | Mount Royal Flush
programme.desc: As our third day at Playground Poker Club in Montreal carries on, we showcase some hands we can't believe and some names we can't pronounce. Featuring Manig Loeser, John Duthie, Mike Dentale, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E32 | The City of Saints
programme.desc: We conclude our final day of filming with the pros at partypoker at the Playground Poker Club in Montreal Featuring Manig Loeser, John Duthie, Jason Koon, Rob Yong, Pascal Lefrancois, Samuel Chartier, and Elliot Smith.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E33 | Hanson Family Values
programme.desc: Our first day of high stakes cash kicks off at Choctaw Casino, where Kyle Bowker puts on a poker clinic and runs over this table full of sharks! Featuring Bart Hanson, Kane Kalas, Mike Ross, Kyle Bowker, David Baker, Douglas Lorgeree and Sean Mates.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E34 | The Butcher, The Baker, The Over Pair Maker
programme.desc: Can anything stop Kyle Bowker? Apparently not the sharks at this high stakes cash game. It's the secone half of day one here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Bart Hanson, Kane Kalas, Mike Ross, Kyle Bowker, David Baker, Douglas Lorgeree, Bobby Greeson and Sean Mates.

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E35 | The Canadian Sensation
programme.desc: It's the return of everyone's favorite poker degen to the Poker Night table: the Canadian sensation Gavin Smith! Witness his greatness for the start of day two here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Alec Torelli, Esther Taylor, Matt Glantz, Gavin Smith, Chan Pelton, David Baker, and Maxx Coleman

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E36 | Outplayed Like A Mo-Fo
programme.desc: If watching infamous poker player Mike Dentale experience excruciating pain is your jam, then this episode is for you. It's part two day two at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Alec Torelli, Esther Taylor, Mike Dentale, Gavin Smith, Chan Pelton, David Baker, and Will Berry

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E37 | Carrot Top of Poker
programme.desc: The Carrot Top of Poker, Jim Carroll, covers the table in comedic props, and Table Captain Gavin Smith is having none of it! This is Day 3 Part 1 at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Jim Carroll, Alec Torelli, Abdyl Konjuhi, Gavin Smith, Matt Russell, Bart Hanson, and Tom Gray

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E38 | Good Hugger
programme.desc: Alec Torelli shows us why he is one of the best players in the biz, and Gavin Smith gets a hug. It's the end of Day 3 here at Choctaw Casino in Durant, Oklahoma. Featuring Jim Carroll, Alec Torelli, Abdyl Konjuhi, Gavin Smith, Matt Russell, Kyle Bowker, and Denise Good

programme.title: Poker Night In America | S05 E39 | Fold Like A Pro
