programme.sub-title: Stoked on Fishing — Fishing with Veterans on the El Dorado
programme.desc: There is no pill, no prescription, and no vaccination that can cure the effects of PTS better than connecting with fellow Veterans through shared experiences. Stoked On Fishing and Save The Brave to bring awareness to PTSD (Post Traumatic syndrome). In this special episode, we take a group of veterans fishing on the El Dorado out of Long Beach Sportfishing. We catch giant southern California White Sea Bass, Calico Bass, Sheep's Head, and Yellowtail.

programme.title: Angling Buzz - Fishing for Summertime Bluegill and Crappie
programme.sub-title: Angling Buzz - Fishing for Summertime Bluegill and Crappie
programme.desc: Don't sleep on the summer panfish bite! The lion's share of panfishing occurs during the springtime when the fish are concentrated in the shallow waters and also in the winter, but summertime can be absolutely fantastic for bluegill and crappie. Just like other gamefish, they can make dramatic seasonal movements and you'll need to find them first before you can catch them. Today, we're joined by panfish aficionado Joel Nelson.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: The DCD crew spends a day on the water fishing in an effort to complete the trifecta of a meat haul. Blake shows us where he spent much of his childhood and we get a glimpse of mother natures impact on community.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: Not my first trip to Texas, but my first chance to get a Texas buck did not disappoint on this trip. What started off as just a waterfowl photography shoot turned into an opportunity for me to grab a buck tag/license. No fence, low fence, or high fence…. Texas has some great hunting! There isn’t too many warm whitetail hunts that can be me excited but bonus hunts will get me every time!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: When Under Armour became the Title Sponsor of the Tactical Games, well…. I actually learned what the Tactical Games were. Kinda cross fit, kinda strong man all mixed with AR and pistol shooting. Ok, Sign me up!! But what did I just sign up for?! I was about to find out!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: John heads up to Saskatchewan to chase whitetails with BBD Outfitters. After some luck early in the week, an opportunity of a lifetime to take a moose is just a trigger pull away! John’s friend Leslie, former Marine, and catfish angler is up to bat first as she checks off a whitetail buck and moose herself in this loaded episode! You don’t know cold until it hits negative 33.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: With the Iowa Late Muzzleloader season almost over and a thick snow covering, hopes of filling “one more tag” were up in the air. A second chance at redemption was offered on an awesome 6.5 year old Iowa buck. Cold temps, food plots, and a favorable wind can be just the things needed to fill a late season tag.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: In most cases, the cameraman or woman hunts as well… Often their “play time” happens between scheduled season hunts for the show. But why don’t we see those? This year, I made it a point to film all of my camera girl’s hunts and decided to make an episode out of it. Without help, none of this possible! So to all the camera operators, behind the scenes industry folks… Thank you and this is for you!!!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: A last minute trip was added to the schedule when an opportunity to join the Rise Fishing Co crew in Andros Island for Bonefish and Barracuda. I started fly fishing a few years ago but this is the first time out in the open and dealing with ocean wind for the elusive Bones! Of all forms of fishing, this is for sure the closest thing I’ve matched to spot/stalk archery.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: Spring turkey is here! John sets his sights on chasing gobblers in Iowa and after notching the first tag, it’s time to head back to Kentucky. John grew up in the Bluegrass state and doesn’t get to hunt or visit as much as he’d like but after this season, he’s reminded why it’s important to return back home and keep that hunting camaraderie alive and well!

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: After receiving an invite to hunt mule deer in Colorado from a buddy, I jumped at the opportunity. My first time ever hunting Colorado did not disappoint. Spot/stalk on the ground with a bow will always be the most challenging, humbling, and sometimes rewarding ways to hunt. My reward... a first ever velvet Colorado Mule Deer!

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: "North America Deer Slam- Carmen Mountain Whitetail "
programme.desc: Mark Peterson is south of the border in Mexico going after the elusive Carmen Mountain Whitetail. Known as the cousin to Coues deer, the Carmen Mountain Whitetail is small in stature but aggressive by nature. With the rut heating up Mark finds himself high on a glassing knob trying to make a move on a shooter buck.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: In this episode, Mark Peterson chases after a Red Stag, Black Buck and Fallow deer. There’s no shortage of action in this video. Argentina's borders were closed during the peak of COVID, so these animals have not been hunted for two years, which led to a game rich environment and excellent trophy quality. On this adventure, Mark is joined by his dad Earl, brother Aaron and nephew Alec to chase some of the biggest free-range Red Stags in the world. Stay tuned for more on this family adventure in Argentina.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: "North America Deer Slam- Oregon Columbia Whitetail "
programme.desc: This week, Mark Peterson is in Oregon chasing the Columbia Whitetail. Found in only two counties of Oregon, the Columbia Whitetail is one of the most sought-after deer species. The first day posed its challenges with heavy fog at daybreak, but Mark and his guide Rob kept the pursuit for a big Columbia Whitetail. After putting on many miles throughout the morning, the fog began to lift and they finally laid eyes on their target buck. Moving into position had its challenges with plenty of satellite deer around, but in the end it came together. As an added bonus, Mark’s buck is the new Muzzleloader world record Columbia Whitetail.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: "North America Deer Slam- Northwestern Whitetails in Saskatchewan"
programme.desc: It's early November and Mark Peterson heads north of the border to Saskatchewan to chase down his Northwestern whitetail. Unseasonably cold temps are staring Mark in the face and it has the deer hunkered down for a day and a half, but the power of food prevailed. On day two, with only 8 minutes left of shooting light, Mark's target buck showed up.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: "Cinnamon Teal Everywhere- First Hunt In Peru | , South American Waterfowl Slam"
programme.desc: Mark's quest for the South America Waterfowl Slam has now taken him to Peru where he finds a surprising density of Cinnamon Teal. Although he already checked this species off the list in Argentina, his first hunt in Peru proves to be one of the best Cinnamon Teal shoots of his life. This is only the first afternoon and there are 5 days left to hunt the remaining 7 species.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: "North America Deer Slam- Plains Whitetail in Colorado"
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues on his Deer Slam and takes to the state of Colorado for the Plains Whitetail. Not often do you see more Moose than Whitetail, but after many miles on his Meindl Boots he finds a good buck bedded. A short stalk leads to quite a surprising walk-up.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: "North America Deer Slam- California Mule Deer on Catalina Island"
programme.desc: Join Mark Peterson as he continues on his journey for the North America Deer Slam. Next up on the list, he sets his sights on the California Mule Deer on Catalina Island. The boat ride to Catalina Island itself would be an adventure, seeing a ton of sea life along the way. Find out if Mark and another hunter in camp will succeed or if the island will prove itself to be a formidable opponent.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: "North America Deer Slam- California Sambar On Hearst Ranch"
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his journey for the North America Deer Slam. Next up on the list, a California Sambar. Sambar originated from Asia and were brought over to the Hearst Ranch in the early 1920s. After a fire wiped out the enclosure, they decided to let the animals roam the 80,000-acre estate. With proper management and selective harvests, these Sambar have thrived for the last 95 years.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson is south of the border in Veracruz, Mexico going after a Mexican Gulf Coast Whitetail. When the whitetail action slowed down, Mark tried his luck at a spot-and stalk hunt for White-lipped Peccary. With hot temps, Mark and company try to find water that the Peccary will be targeting to stay hydrated.

programme.title: Beyond The Surface
programme.desc: Join Captain Danny Allen and Hall of Fame winner Leiza Fitzgerald of CCA Florida Star as the 2 veteran anglers mix tactics and tackle ideas in the Steinhatchee flats! Join in while they fish through some foggy cool weather and teach transitional ways to consistently put fish in the boat while sharing some CCA Star Tournament details for 2024!!

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Capt Justin Leake and Meredith McCord divert attention from what’s not happening with the tarpon bite to using CoastMaster, light tackle and experience to find snapper success on heavily fished public spots.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Deer season — the sights, the sounds and the smells stick with you. It’s about remembering those who came before us and setting the right example for those who look up to us. It’s about protecting the tradition, so they always have something to look forward to. When communities come together, we see the real reason for this special time of year.

programme.title: HUnting Land Man
programme.desc: In this episode, Slade and his brother Tai take us around a new investment property - a 55 acre tract in Wilkinson County, MS and go over what it took to take an undesirable raw tract, to a place with multiple offers on the first day it was put on the market.

programme.title: HUnting Land Man
programme.desc: In this episode Slade takes Bentley on his very first duck hunt. Slade also gets to take a trip to duck hunting paradise with some great buddies of his. This episode is all about having a great time with great friends.
Brady Snyder hunts down a giant Iowa buck on public land.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: Rifle season is off to a slow start but things are heating up with lots of tags to fill.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: With the King of the Raven in full swing, Randy decides to have a doe challenge to close out the season. With a bunch of buddies coming into camp this next week is about to be full of Surprises.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "Chipper Jones Scores During Nebraska's Deer Season Opener"
programme.desc: After a shift in the wind direction, everyone settles into new locations. The highly anticipated opening day does not disappoint, though. Chipper Jones makes the right move and gets rewarded when a beautiful 10-pointer (that's fresh out of velvet) gets up and walks his way.

programme.title: Wentz Brother's Outdoors
programme.desc: Zach and Carson Wentz head home to North Dakota to chase geese, ducks, and pheasants.

programme.title: Wentz Brother's Outdoors
programme.desc: Zach heads back to the homeland to chase ducks and geese in the prairie potholes.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.sub-title: "Turkey Hunting the Deep South - Highs and Lows"
programme.desc: Turkey hunting in the Deep South is infamous for hard-to-hunt gobblers. The Turkey POSSE heads to Mississippi where they get schooled and can’t scratch out a gobbler to save their lives. They move over to Georgia for opening day and continue to struggle, but eventually a lone gobbler caves and slips into range for the Savage Renegauge. This hunt also brings us on a flashback to much more promising turkey hunting in Minnesota, where the POSSE runs into a pile of northern longbeards.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Late season goose hunting in Kansas with Slade Northwest.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal
programme.desc: In the Pilot episode of Goin’ Coastal High School sweethearts Josh and Anna Calhoon hit their local waters of Ft. Walton Beach, FL and show off the diversity of the Estuary.

programme.title: Modern Hunter
programme.desc: In our pilot episode of Modern hunter, Brad Rucks heads to Saskatchewan for his first ever Canada black bear hunt.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "Chipper Jones Scores During Nebraska's Deer Season Opener"
programme.desc: After a shift in the wind direction, everyone settles into new locations. The highly anticipated opening day does not disappoint, though. Chipper Jones makes the right move and gets rewarded when a beautiful 10-pointer (that's fresh out of velvet) gets up and walks his way.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "Getting Close to Giant White-Tailed Deer and Big Bull Elk"
programme.desc: It's a couple days into the season, and the guys adjust get closer to these big Nebraska bucks. Tyler Jordan and Riley Green both have great hunts. Chipper Jones has a surprise encounter while trying to fill a doe tag.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "Cameraman Turned Bowhunter | Brown's Biggest Buck Ever"
programme.desc: Tyler Jordan and Bryan Brown have been playing cat and mouse with "Big Heavy" throughout their Nebraska trip. During some midday downtime, Brown wins a bet with Jordan on a 50-yard shot to earn himself the right to be in the hot seat. The guys continue making adjustments to get close to the buck. It results in Brown tagging his biggest buck ever.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "The Redemption Buck | Riley Green Goes Back to Nebraska"
programme.desc: Country music artist, Riley Green heads back to Nebraska to give it one last try on some of the target deer he was hunting a few weeks prior. It doesn’t take long before he has an opportunity at a big Nebraska shooter. Game on.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "GEORGIA Redemption Gobbler | Realtree Road Trips"
programme.desc: After a tough go at it in Oklahoma, Rigsby Stewart gets back to his home turf in East Georgia. This turkey gobbled his head off! Sweet redemption in the Georgia Pines!

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "Chasing a Milk River Giant | Bowhunting Montana Whitetails"
programme.desc: Tyler Jordan heads to Montana, which is one of his favorite trips of the year. The Milk River is a very special place to the Realtree crew, and it doesn't take long before they spot a giant. Will they close the distance? Find out now.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "175" Georgia MONSTER BUCK | Realtree Road Trips"
programme.desc: Tyler Jordan hunts one of the biggest bucks on Realtree Farms with his brother Colton. Colton and his Dad Bill, have seen this buck several times over the last few days not he and Tyler make a move hoping to get Colton a shot at this giant Georgia whitetail.

programme.title: Realtree Roadtrips
programme.sub-title: Road Trips - "Legendary Whitetail Falls | Spot and Stalking on the Milk River"
programme.desc: Tyler Jordan heads back to the Milk River in hopes of catching up with a buck they call “Hightower." After spotting the buck from 400 yards away, Jordan decides to plan a spot-and-stalk effort to get in range of it. Crawling through the snow in frigid temperatures proved the right decision, and was well worth it.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground
programme.desc: Legendary Pro Skateboarders Mike McGill and Bucky Lasek of the Bones Brigade join Nick for high-flying dorado action off SoCal and Mexico

programme.title: Saltwater Underground
programme.desc: Absolute tuna insanity off the Jersey Coast as Nick joins the crew of the Mushin and the Mama Tried for both day and night trips to chunk, troll and jig for yellowfin tuna.

programme.title: Saltwater Underground
programme.desc: Rock star Dean Ween joins Nick for splashing, crashing and thrashing surf action as the Jersey surf is firing for striped bass blitzing on bait.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal
programme.desc: Josh and Anna set out for a last minute fishing trip that runs a little late. They take a quick detour to the parent pick up line to get the kids from school, and head back out on the water to see what’s biting!

programme.title: Goin' Coastal
programme.desc: Josh takes his friend Isaiah to the blue water as they look for destin's latest hot bite, the blackfin tuna.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal
programme.desc: Josh and George from Two Georges Marina battle the wind and tide on a tough day of fishing which leads Josh to fish another day, solely for revenge on the Sheepshead!

programme.desc: A Southwest Mississippi GIANT “Barry” has Slade’s brain in scrambles as he is preparing to head to Iowa after waiting 5 years to finally draw his tag. The chase is on let’s see if the Hunting Land Man can seal a deal!

programme.desc: A Southwest Mississippi GIANT “Barry” has made more daylight appearances than possibly any mature bucks in existence. Now that Slade is back from the midwest The chase is on.

programme.title: F1 2024's Most Interesting Tech Upgrades So Far
programme.sub-title: F1 2024's Most Interesting Tech Upgrades So Far
programme.desc: Almost halfway through the 2024 F1 calendar, Formula 1 teams have been busy upgrading their cars, trying to beat Red Bull to the podium's top step. But what are the biggest changes on the grid so far? From Mercedes' novel front wing concept to McLaren's sidepods, Ferrari's engine cover to Red Bull's rear wing, Jake Boxall-Legge channels his inner Bob Ross to illustrate over photos the most interesting and noteworthy upgrades of the season pre-Spanish Grand Prix.

programme.title: F1 Austrian GP Analysis - Never Give Up VS Never Back Down
programme.sub-title: F1 Austrian GP Analysis - Never Give Up VS Never Back Down
programme.desc: The 2024 F1 Austrian Grand Prix certainly didn't hold back, especially towards the end with Lando Norris and Max Verstappen making contact while trying to secure the victory! But were the track limit rulings fair, or should more penalties have been issued? Bryn Lucas chats with Alex Kalinauckas and Filip Cleeren to discuss the McLaren x Red Bull controversy, Russell's ability to grab the win and more.

programme.title: Stock Car Pro: Round 2: Velocitta - Race 2 Restart
programme.sub-title: Stock Car Pro: Round 2: Velocitta - Race 2 Restart
programme.desc: Watch the second race of the second round of the 2024 Stock Car Pro Series championship at Velocitta. This is a restart of the second race that was canceled due to rain in March.

programme.title: F1 Austrian GP Analysis - Never Give Up VS Never Back Down
programme.sub-title: F1 Austrian GP Analysis - Never Give Up VS Never Back Down
programme.desc: The 2024 F1 Austrian Grand Prix certainly didn't hold back, especially towards the end with Lando Norris and Max Verstappen making contact while trying to secure the victory! But were the track limit rulings fair, or should more penalties have been issued? Bryn Lucas chats with Alex Kalinauckas and Filip Cleeren to discuss the McLaren x Red Bull controversy, Russell's ability to grab the win and more.

programme.title: E-Xplorer FIM World Cup

programme.desc: ROUND 2 RECAP IS NOW LIVE! The moment you have been waiting for! Watch our 8 teams + wild card team number 9 race against the clock, and each other, on top of the mountain in 2200 metres high altitude. Check out who makes it to 1st place this time.

programme.sub-title: Bike World: Episode 5 - The Triumph Street Triple RS on Jerez
programme.desc: Lara takes the new Triumph Street Triple RS to the track, the Jerez circuit to be exact, meanwhile, Chad tests another naked bike, the Ducati Monster SP.

programme.title: Le Mans Cup
programme.desc: Catch all the highlights from the third round of the Michelin Le Mans Cup at Circuit de la Sarthe.

programme.title: F1 2024's Most Interesting Tech Upgrades So Far
programme.sub-title: F1 2024's Most Interesting Tech Upgrades So Far
programme.desc: Almost halfway through the 2024 F1 calendar, Formula 1 teams have been busy upgrading their cars, trying to beat Red Bull to the podium's top step. But what are the biggest changes on the grid so far? From Mercedes' novel front wing concept to McLaren's sidepods, Ferrari's engine cover to Red Bull's rear wing, Jake Boxall-Legge channels his inner Bob Ross to illustrate over photos the most interesting and noteworthy upgrades of the season pre-Spanish Grand Prix.

programme.sub-title: F1 Austrian GP Analysis - Never Give Up VS Never Back Down

But were the track limit rulings fair, or should more penalties have been issued? Bryn Lucas chats with Alex Kalinauckas and Filip Cleeren to discuss the McLaren x Red Bull controversy, Russell's ability to grab the win and more.

programme.title: MOTORVISION.TV #SPOTTED
programme.desc: The Nürburgring is the most dangerous, yet the most beautiful race track in the world and meeting point for racing icons and car rarities. The annual Sport1 Track Day lures thousands of petrol heads to the iconic track.

programme.title: MOTORVISION.TV #SPOTTED
programme.desc: Ola Stenegard, Head of Vehicle Design at BMW Motorrad, meets world-famous motorcycle customizers in Los Angeles. Also: we present the craziest 'homemade supercars' such as the Fahrradi Farfalla FFX, the slowest sports car in the world.

programme.title: Lancia Stratos HF
programme.desc: The Lancia Stratos with Ferrari power, the rally icon of the 1970s.

programme.title: BMW M6 Gran Coupe
programme.desc: The M6 Gran Coupe is the latest creation from BMW's M-works subdivision. The Bavarians show that driving this V8 powered car almost feels like flying, even with the whole family on board.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: Once again it was time for the VLN Endurance Racing Championship. While the drivers were doing their test laps, we had a look behind the scenes and explored what went on in the pit lanes.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: The fourth race of the VLN season is usually regarded as a dress rehearsal for the 24-hour race. For the top teams and best drivers it is the last opportunity for a really thorough test.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: We present the highlights of last week. The 24 hour race was exciting, as usual. In addition, we explored the 'Strong Man Run' and took a look at the tourist drivers

programme.title: BMW 503
programme.desc: The noble four-seater 503 convertible was one of BMWs most exclusive models in the 1950s. Many international sports and movie stars and other wealthy customers were fond of this sporty luxury vehicle.

programme.title: Volvo S90
programme.desc: It looks sportier than one might expect from the Swedes. The taillights frame the powerful looking rear. On the inside, the Volvo S90 impresses with the finest materials and soft nappa leather.

programme.title: Alfa Romeo 6C 2500SS
programme.desc: Founded in 1910, the iconic Italian car manufacturer Alfa Romeo experienced a very eventful history. Their 6C 2500 SS model is right in the middle of the company's more than 100-year history. It combined new technology with an early post-war appearance.

programme.title: Offroad & Fun, Part 5
programme.desc: Offroad & Fun are a thrilling TV specials that take viewers on an adrenaline-fueled journey through the world of extreme motorsports.

programme.title: Offroad & Fun, Part 5
programme.desc: Offroad & Fun are a thrilling TV specials that take viewers on an adrenaline-fueled journey through the world of extreme motorsports.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes are still at the ski resort, preparing a spectacular stunt involving a station wagon that is catapulted 50 meters high into the air. The high-flying car is supposed to crash into another car that is placed on a meadow.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: This episode features the most spectacular classic body stunts: jumping from rooftops or the top of a driving cars, falling down staircases, and other potentially bone-breaking daredevilry, including fails and outtakes.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Rollovers, ramp jumps, crashes - there are thousands of ways to destroy cars, and the Stunt Heroes produce a lot of wrecks over the course of their adrenaline-filled job. It's a look back at the car stunt highlights of the past episodes.

programme.title: BMW F 800 R
programme.desc: BMW F 800 R is a robust roadster with a lot of spirit, and even motorcycle world champions count on its agility. World champion, Chris Pfeiffer is showing just how much fun you can have with a BMW F 800 R. His work motorcycle is based on the version that you can buy.

programme.title: Ken Block - Gymkhana Grid
programme.desc: Spectacular drifts are to be expected when Ken Block visits the Gymkhana Grid.

programme.title: Ken Block at the Monza Rallye Show
programme.desc: In Monza, Ken Block is set to compete against Allstars from motorsport at the Monza Rally Show.

programme.title: Bentley Mulsanne EWB
programme.desc: The long version of the Bentley Mulsanne is a prime example of a chauffeured limousine. With it, the British luxury car brand has set the bar extremely high when it comes to automotive comfort.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: What are the characteristics of a typical German car? Do stereotypes like functionality, reliability but also a certain dullness paint a realistic picture? Also, we explored if the Volkswagen Golf GTE could bring new impulses to the brand's model range.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Slippery or muddy roads and bad visibility are circumstances that often spoil driving pleasure in winter. We took two almost identical Porsche 911's to an icy test track. Also: drifting fun in the snow with the Suzuki SX4 S-Cross.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: 4-door coupes combine the best of two worlds, the performance of a coupe and the style of a limousine. We took a closer look at three examples of this car subspecies, the Audi A7, BMW's 4 Series Gran Coupe, and the Mercedes-Benz CLA models.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The top-of-the-line specimens of a car model range are built for pure driving pleasure. We put the VW Golf R, the Audi TTS and the BMW M 235i to the test in order to see if they are worthy of bearing the crown of their model range.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: In 2015 Audi presented a facelift for their city racer A1. We put this compact to the test. Also: it's a tough competition in the compact class, and Renault and Peugeot also want a piece of the pie. We compared the Renault Twingo and the Peugeot 108.

programme.title: Mercedes 300 SL Lightweight
programme.desc: An iconic racing car and one of only 29 ever built! We accompanied the Mercedes 300 SL 'lightweight' on its premiere drive at the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: The search for the fastest, best looking and best sounding car continues. Once more car lovers from the Middle East bring their tuned vehicles to the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach and have it judged by Saif Hattawi. The winner receives a special treat for two people from the luxurious Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. A Ford Mustang and a limited edition Chevrolet Corvette try to win the competition.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: Put Your Car on TV gives every car owner the chance to bring their tuned machines to the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah beach. There, Saif Hattawi will assess each car based on speed, style and sound. The person with the most amazing car wins a one night stay at the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach for two people. A BMW X6M, a massive Ford F250 and a special Nissan Patrol try to win this prize.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: The Walk' at JBR, the most prestigious location in Dubai, sets the background for the fastest customized cars in the Middle East. Put Your Car on TV invites car owners to present their cars and have it judged. The owner of the fastest, most beautiful and best sounding car wins a special treat from Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. Among the competitors are a Lamborghini Aventador and a GMC Chevrolet.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: Once more, Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi are on the hunst for the most amazing cars in the world and ask car owners to bring their customized vehicles to Dubai, where it will be awarded points based on speed, style and sound. The car with the points wins a stay at the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach for two people. Among the presented cars are a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: On Put Your Car on TV people from the Middle East present their tuned vehicles. They are rewarded with points based on its styling, the highest (possible) speed ever driven und naturally also its sound. Whoever receives the most points, wins a luxurious treat from the Sofitel Hotel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. This time, a Lexus GSF, a Ford Mustang and a McLaren MP4-12C are put on the spotlight.

programme.title: Mercedes-AMG GT S Performmaster
programme.desc: Not far from Stuttgart is the home of the tuner Performmaster who specialize in the performance optimization of Mercedes-AMG models. They turned the already more-than-potent GT S sports car into a beast.

programme.title: Beradino
programme.desc: A „bella macchina“, a beautiful car - but not designed by masters like Bertone or Pininfarina. Johannes Paulussen from Neuss in Germany built the Beradino by hand.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: After its introduction the Audi RS6 was the benchmark when it came to extreme estate cars. The car's power and performance was already very impressive, but according to the Audi tuners that still wasn't enough. Their challenge was to improve something that was already great.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Do you want to feel like a race driver without being limited to a race track? If so, the British manufacturer Radical has the perfect solution for you. The company builds race cars with road approval. Their RXC is an extremely aggressive and agile racer. And the best thing about it is that it's street legal, but doesn´t feel like that at all.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the 6th generation of two US classics, the Ford Mustang GT and the Chevrolet Corvette Z06, at these iconic sports cars' history and development over the past decades.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? - You come up with the GT3. - The Porsche 911 GT3 with its 475 hp engine is the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And the German brand's RS model is even more intense when it comes to power, performance and ultimate sports car feel.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Ferrari's California T model heralded a new era for the Italian sports car manufacturer. After its facelift the T was the first Ferrari with a turbo engine since the iconic F40 which was built until 1992. Even manufacturers like Ferrari can’t avoid some downsizing once in a while, given this exclusive but highly competitive market segment.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Nowadays people associate the name Bentley with elegance and luxury, but the British brand also has another side. Since its establishment in 1919, Bentley consistently drew attention via its ongoing success in motor sports. The limited edition Continental GT3-R with less weight and more power than the regular model was one of the iconic manufacturer's sportiest cars ever.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: For more than 50 years the Porsche 911 has been holding the crown as one of the best sports cars in the world. But the competition still tries to overthrow the champion. Two manufacturers recently jousted with the 911 in order to lure customers away. The Jaguar F-Type R and the Mercedes AMG GT S are the Porsche’s strongest rivals.

programme.title: Cadillac Escalade
programme.desc: The Cadillac Escalade at first seems like a typical rather beefy American car, but this luxurious SUV is more of a lovable, gentle giant, that should be able to gain sympathy with its clientele.

programme.title: Arden AJ23
programme.desc: A Jaguar that is able to terrify the world alone with its roar. This Jaguar F-Type R tuned by Arden is a real bad boy. Already in the series production configuration, the F-Type R Coupe is a dream car that can really bite but this Jaguar which has been upgraded from Arden, now calls itself "AJ23“ and is more powerful, louder and more aggressive than any of his brothers.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY returns to Europe as current lightweight champion Robin van Roosmalen puts his title on the line in a rematch against Sittichai Sitsongpeenong. Plus, a four-man welterweight tournament featuring Murthel Groenhart, Yoann Kongolo, Harut Grigorian, and Karim Benmansour.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The GLORY 33 SuperFight Series features a middleweight title fight between champion SImon Marcus and top ranked challenger Jason Wilnis. Plus a heavyweight battle between Chi Lewis Parry and Anthony McDonald.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The 'King of Kickboxing' Rico Verhoeven puts his heavyweight belt on the line as he faces off against Brazilian Anderson Silva. Also, a one night, four-man featherweight tournament featuring former champion Serhii Adamchuk.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Donovan Wisse (20-1, 10 KO) puts his middleweight championship on the line against number one contender Ulric Bokeme (32-4, 17 KO) in the main event of the evening. Wisse is one of the top P4P kickboxers on the planet today and is chasing his fourth straight title defense. After his Grand Prix heroics, the number one ranked heavyweight Levi Rigters (17-2, 8 KO) returns to action to take on dangerous late notice replacement Nico Pereira Horta (22-8, 3 KO) in the co-main event. The ‘King of The Hague’ crown is up for grabs when rivals Michael Boapeah (16-4-1, 7 KO) and Serkan Ozcaglayan (45-9, 36 KO) clash. The two top middleweights meet in this local derby match-up where the winner walks away with bragging rights in a fight that is sure to split the arena.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 36 SuperFight Series is headlined by Congolese-German light heavyweight Danyo Ilunga throwing down with the Netherlands' Michael Duut. Armenian-Belgian power puncher Harut Grigorian battles 23-year-old German prospect Danijel Solaja at welterweight in the can't miss co-headline bout. Plus two Super Bantamweight Grand Prix bouts. Muay Thai champion and MMA star Tiffany van Soest meets Canadian challenger Jessica Gladstone in one semifinal match-up, while 21-year-old Dutch prospect Isis Verbeek takes on undefeated Amel Dehby of France. The winners of each semifinal match-up will advance to the Grand Prix tournament final – the opening bout of GLORY: COLLISION.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The Lightweight title is on the line as Sittichai looks to defend his title against #1 challenger Marat Grigorian. There is also a four-man lightweight tournament on the card.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: It's the fight everyone wants to see as GLORY Heavyweight champion, Rico Verhoeven takes on Badr Hari. Plus, the Welterweight title is on the line as Nieky Holzken meets Cedric Doumbé.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The GLORY 39 Superfight Series is headlined by a Lightweight title fight as champion Sittichai defends his crown against Dylan Salvador.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Recently crowned champion Cedric Doumbe puts his title on the line against Yoann Kongolo who has beaten Doumbe twice before. Plus four featherweights compete in the GLORY 39 Featherweight tournament.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Jason 'Psycho' Wilnis puts his belt back on the line against the man he took it from in 2016: Canada's Simon 'The ONE' Marcus.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 36 SuperFight Series is headlined by Congolese-German light heavyweight Danyo Ilunga throwing down with the Netherlands' Michael Duut. Muay Thai champion and MMA star Tiffany van Soest meets Canadian challenger Jessica Gladstone in one semifinal match-up, while 21-year-old Dutch prospect Isis Verbeek takes on undefeated Amel Dehby of France. The winners of each semifinal match-up will advance to the Grand Prix tournament final – the opening bout of GLORY: COLLISION.

programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

Robot Wars
programme.desc: Only one team can win the £20,000 cash prize, and they could be competing in this week’s heat. A close first round leaves it up to the judges to decide who will progress through the heat.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A newcomer has an aggressive start to their first battle, with no competitor or house robot left unchallenged. Will they make it all the way to final or be punished for their hubris?

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A featherweight battle between this week’s rounds. Robots that weigh no more than 12kg battle to join the other qualifiers. The main competition proceeds as evenly matched robots do anything they can to get the upper hand.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Canada and Switzerland both battle in the World Championship Qualifier special event. The heats near their end and spots for the final are filling up rapidly and to a high standard.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: It’s all-out war as Refbot is immobilised and Sir Killalot may have finally met his match. One round ends exceptionally quickly. Another World Championship Qualifier between three Dutch robots is this week’s special event.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The last of the heats, the final eight robots that have a chance of making it to the Grand Final, will they seize the opportunity or choke under the pressure? A featherweight champion will be revealed in this week’s special event.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight of the heat winners gather for the first Semi-Finals. With two rounds to prove themselves, only two robots will make it to the Grand Finals. Competitors show no mercy as they use any means necessary to eliminate their opponents.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One competitor’s weapon proves fatal for their opposition, crushing their hopes of a title with a single blow, whilst other unlucky robots are removed from not only the arena, but also the competition.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The Grand Final is here as the series draws to an explosive end. With every battle being so well matched, the judges have their work cut out for them as they decide which robot, will become Robot Wars: The Seventh Wars champions.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Six robots enter arena and will not stop battling until only one remains in this annihilator main event. The House Robot Rebellion pitted two competitors against Mr. Psycho, Growler and Cassius Chrome.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Witness the human drama of competitor’s desperation for victory and the resulting mechanical carnage.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Follow the exploits of teams all over the country as they battle it out in hopes of becoming champion.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The second round of semi-finals follows six more teams that have made it through the heats and are one step closer to Grand Final.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, this competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this dark breathtaking scene, Bob Ross creates an almost calm night with waves crashing against rocks and protective lighthouse.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Journey into the country with Bob Ross and watch how he creates this magnificent painting by adding a large old mill into the heart of the forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this one-of-a-kind masterpiece, Bob Ross paints a vibrant golden red glow, complete with cowboy restin’ a while by the cracklin’ flames.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Powerful clouds, rolling hills and winding river waters -- Bob Ross creates this masterpiece using only his special painting knife.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us deep into the southeastern peninsula to create a beautiful scene with still blue waters and bright green mossy trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Evening sky sets in, giving way to a perfect glow -- watch a black canvas come to life under the magic brushes of Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the midst of a cold, wintry forest, Bob Ross gently places a magical little wooden shanty upon a bed of soft snow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: With brush in hand, Bob Ross leads you on a summertime nature walk, as you uncover the beauty of leafy trees and pond.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Using a different technique or two, Bob Ross creates a fascinating scene – watch the sun drop below the horizon, just behind the shadow of trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: To capture the innocence of a stream-side cottage, Bob Ross creates a giant mountain standing majestically in the distance.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visiting artist, Ben Stahl, uses a more traditional painting method to bring out the coy loveliness of a little girl.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross helps a timid little stream find its way to a delightful waterfall, while gazing upon a forest of elegant trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an expansive barn appearing half-covered in a snowy setting of frost bitten foliage and sun-kissed sky.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: It’s almost fall, and Bob Ross captures the undaunted power and charm of a mighty brown mountain surveying its rustic surroundings.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Talented guest painter Steve Ross shows you how to create a mirror-like lake spanning the width of snowy peaks and foothills.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Layers and layers of mountains, as far as the eye can see -- Bob Ross shows us the secret to creating a larger-than-life landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses monochromatic tones to convey the icy coldness of a silvery lake surrounded by lacy trees and bushes – brr!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Leisurely stroll along the beach and breaking wave with Bob Ross and experience the calm of day’s end under a colorful setting sun … in an oval!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a pleasant walk through the forest with Bob Ross and breathe in that crisp, rain-freshened air – but be careful of those puddles!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Even a cold, frozen snowy afternoon can be displayed with signs of astonishing beauty, as portrayed by Bob Ross in this lovely yet simple scene.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Come along with Bob Ross as he creates a winter moon hanging over a snow covered farm nestled among the trees – all on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Towering mountains protect a lovely green river land, where gentle waters flow and silent breezes blow – another Bob Ross masterpiece to cherish.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross as he paints a lovely scenic mountain surrounded by quiet, soft, misty foothills.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit a quaint little home with Bob Ross and experience the beauty of tender morn in the stillness of the forest; what a delightful painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Lovely soft colors flow from the magnificent brushes of Bob Ross in this lovely warm winter painting … don’t miss seeing this pretty scene unfold.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Pick up your brushes and paint along with Bob Ross – he creates a beautiful, rocky stream gently rippling through the forest mist in an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a spectacular mountain scene in a faux matte; a real masterpiece cleverly framed in an intriguing new idea!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: As the foliage reaches its peak of autumn beauty, experience the tranquility of nice meadow, pond and happy birch tree. All painted the Bob Ross way!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Soft misty background, sweet snow-kissed cabin and rich trees and bushes – all nestled down inside a winter oval painting by Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a drive into the country with Bob Ross and pass through an old covered bridge into a landscape bursting with soft fall foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a drive into the country with Bob Ross and pass through an old covered bridge into a landscape bursting with soft fall foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: It’s a cold, cold winter day but Bob Ross offers a warm and roomy barn as refuge from the snowy blanket covering the farm.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Relish the tranquility of valley waters gently falling into a quiet summer mere – smooth cliffs and trees frame this Bob Ross wonderland.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Venture into the heart of Americana with Bob Ross and discover the serenity of a snow-covered farmhouse and barn on a cold January day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A perfect oval composition! Come along with Bob Ross and see a secluded cottage with wild daisies and birch trees near a small woodland pond.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Step into the natural beauty of an overgrown colorful mead and enjoy the peace and soft tranquility you get from Bob Ross’ painting technique.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A beautiful fall scene -- Bob Ross uses the colors of nature to settle an old worn-down farm building into soft golden grassy bushes and trees.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Beneath a soft purple mountain range, lots of trees and bushes surround a secret little lake, as only Bob Ross can create on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Talented guest artist Steve Ross creates clear blue skies, an almighty mountain and lake lined generously with trees and bushes.

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Tayler and Jason travel to Eureka Springs, Arkansas, a town with a rich history and home to one of the most haunted hotels in America, The Crescent. Jason convinces Tayler to stay one night, but will that stay lead to a night they don't want to remember?

programme.title: Love On the Rocks

programme.desc: The French painter Fabienne Verdier, trained by traditional calligraphers in China, and famous for her large abstract canvases, leaves the safety of her studio and embarks on an exploratory adventure with musicians at the prestigious Juilliard School of Music in New York. The film follows her journey of liberation, as she frees herself from the constraints of her training and rediscovers through improvised collaborations, a world of emotion and creative energy.

programme.title: The World's Greatest Painters - Season 1 - Édouard Manet
programme.desc: Édouard Manet was a major French painter of the late XIXth century. The instigator of modern painting, Manet is wrongly considered today as one of the fathers of Impressionism. His work shares certain traits with this movement, like the use of certain recurrent themes like portraits, marine landscapes, still lifes and Parisian life, He approaches it through certain recurring themes such as portraits, seascapes and still lifes, or even Parisian life. But Manet's work differs from Impressionism in its focus on realism; it does not use the same coloring techniques nor does it stress the depiction of light, then in vogue.

programme.title: Within the frame - Season 1 - Paul Klee
programme.desc: The Centre Paul Klee is the result of a successful project to bring together the masterpieces of a complex artist. In Bern, thousands of visitors discover the intense work of a sacred monster attracted by color and existence.

programme.title: Art quiz - Episode 47
programme.desc: Test and develop your artistic culture with Art Quiz, the game that will allow you to become unaware of art. Whether it's artists, works of art, artistic trends, the price of works... nothing will be a secret for you anymore. Now it's your turn to play!

programme.desc: Test and develop your artistic culture with Art Quiz, the game that will allow you to become unaware of art. Whether it's artists, works of art, artistic trends, the price of works... nothing will be a secret for you anymore. Now it's your turn to play!

programme.title: Sketchbook - Season 2 - The ballpoint pen
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject: - movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparing - and explaining their techniques

programme.title: A special day - Season 1 - Cécile Schall
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Cécile Schall, director of Fotofever, a contemporary photography fair that opens its doors today. For Cécile, the stakes are high because she only has a few hours left to make sure everything is perfect. We will accompany her in her preparations.

programme.title: The World's Greatest Painting Museums - Season 1 - Washington - USA
programme.desc: Washington has two of the most famous Museum exposing a lot of European and American art. The National Gallery of Art is one of the biggest Museum of USA and exhibit Italian Renaissance paintings such as Botticelli or Da Vinci. Classical and modern art are also exhibited with Rembrandt, Monet or Van Gogh. The Phillips Collection is considered as one of the biggest painting collections of USA met by Duncan Philips with more than 3000 masterpieces from Picasso, Kandinsky or Mondrian.

programme.title: Art investigation - Season 1 - Portrait Of Emile Zola - Cezanne
programme.desc: Emile Zola and Paul Cézanne met on the school benches in Aix en Provence. From their "brotherhood of genius", as Zola would say, was born a painting that is now in the Granet Museum in Aix. It represents Emile Zola at the age of 20. It was painted while they were both in Paris, intoxicated by literature and painting. A painting which, on the death of the painter, ended up in the collection of Ambroise Vollard, the greatest art dealer of his time. A man who would reveal Cezanne to the art world. A painting with a mysterious background that speaks above all of a very strong friendship between two great masters.

programme.title: When I grow up I'll be a photographer - Season 1 - Episode 15
programme.desc: In this episode, a student will go to a photo studio to do his end of year internship. The faculty will have a meeting to discuss grades and student behavior. We will then find a student in a clothing store for which he is taking pictures.

programme.title: Art News - Season - Place aux femmes à Nantes
Masters & Composers - Caspar David Friedrich & Wagner - Summer
programme.desc: The series Masters & Composers invites you to discover a painter and a composer on short episodes to discover the beauty and the precision of their works. You will admire a painting while listening to a different composition in each episode. The combination of these two arts will immerse you into the Beaux-Arts and you will discover the masterpieces of Fragonard, Cezanne, Friedrich or Boucher and the compositions of Mozart, Tchaikovsky, Wagner or Handel.

programme.title: Draw me what you see - Season 1 - A boat
programme.desc: Hi, artists! So, for all those who want to conquer the oceans, leave on a desert island or even a treasure, they need something, they need a boat! Well, that's exactly what we're going to learn to draw today.

programme.title: Pop art
programme.desc: In 64 episodes, fun and educational, you will know how to draw an airplane, a fireman, a haunted mansion, a soccer player, a sunset, a lion, the Eiffel Tower, seashells, a fairy... Our master draftsman Gia-Haï Phan will show you the basics of a successful drawing: proportions, perspectives, values, contrasts, volumes, blending, everything is covered.

programme.title: Archi & Design
programme.desc: 500 years after its construction, this film proposes to explain the history of the Castle of Chambord, based on the current work of two historians who are passionate about the iconography and secret codes everywhere in this building. For traveller of the 16th century, the Castle of Chambord seemed to emerge from nothing, like an unexpected construction, with a captivating geometry. Nothing else around but a hostile nature. A miracle, erected however thanks to the genius of man and the power of a king.

programme.title: The World's Greatest Painters - Season 1 - Camille Pissarro
programme.desc: Camille PISSARRO is known as one of the fathers of Impressionism. Born in Saint-Thomas in 1830 in the West Indies, he arrived in Paris to study there during the year of the Universal Exhibition. Pissarro becomes famous with his scenes of Montmartre, the Louvre and the Tuileries. He is above all an impressionist then a neo-impressionist painter, he also paints scenes of rural life and landscapes. He had among others for pupils great artists like Paul Cézanne and Paul Gauguin. He shares his ideas with Paul Gauguin, with whom he will have more difficult relationship. Pissarro died on November 13, 1903 in Paris.

programme.title: Within the frame - Season 1 - William Blake
programme.desc: William Blake (1757-1827) developed his own complex and personal mythology. He was a pre-romantic British painter, engraver and poet.

programme.title: Museum stories - Season 1 - The Guimet Museum
programme.desc: From the first Buddhas found in Afghanistan to the mysterious treasures of Angkor, from the most beautiful Japanese prints to the fine arts of Chinese ceramics, the National Museum of Asian Arts - Guimet offers as many possibilities as possible of course meditative, aesthetic, or exploratory at the heart of Asian history. True to wish of its founder Emile Guimet, the museum brings together today the largest collection of Asian art in Europe.

programme.title: Museum Tour - Season 1 - The Domaine des Collettes - In the eye of Auguste Renoir
programme.sub-title: The Domaine des Collettes - In the eye of Auguste Renoir
programme.desc: In 1908, Pierre-Auguste Renoir had a neo-Provençal style house-studio built in Cagnes-sur-Mer, in The Domaine des Collettes. Also known as Renoir Museum, it has a collection of fourteen original paintings and forty sculptures in a setting that reflects the last years of the painter's life and work. The creative and familiar universe of Renoir, one of the most striking French artists in the history of art is displayed in a remarkable setting with century-old olive trees and citrus trees, with a panorama that extends to the Cap d'Antibes.

programme.title: Art investigation - Season 1 - Severed Heads
programme.desc: Sculptures of severed heads are on display at the Granet Museum in Aix en Provence, among many other relics dating back to 300 BC. We will visit the archaeological site of the oppidum of Entremont. The capital of the Salyans. With the archaeologist Patrice Arcelin, we will get to know these Gauls better, to better understand their rites. Rituals common to many peoples throughout the world, as we will see with Yves Le Fur, the director of the collections of the Musée du quai Branly. This survey of art will take us back to a time when Gauls and Romans were fighting for territory but also sharing their cultures.

programme.title: Travelers - Season 1 - Copenhagen
programme.desc: Today, Travelers takes you to Copenhagen, Denmark, whose name means "the merchant's port". First, we will go to Tivoli Gardens, the oldest amusement park in the world. Then we will go to the city center where we will visit the Church of Our Savior, known for its spiral bell tower. We will talk about design, which is almost a religion in Denmark, but also about Danish gastronomy, and many other things.

programme.title: Painting the Holy Land - Season 1 - In Search of Jesus
programme.desc: Lachlan Goudie follows Jesus’s last days on earth the Holy Week events that see him travel from the north of what is now Israel to Jerusalem, and the crucifixion. It’s a pilgrimage that millions undertake, and a story of love and suffering that has inspired some of the world’s most remarkable masterpieces.

programme.title: The World's Greatest Painters - Season 1 - Paul Cézanne
programme.desc: Paul Cézanne, born in 1839, is the author of numerous portraits and landscapes of Provence in the south of France. On the nineteenth century, painters classified as Impressionists, Cézanne's work extends beyond the Impressionist period and is probably the most difficult to identify. While the Impressionists used small brushstrokes, Paul Cézanne used impasto, emphasized geometric forms and moved toward Cubism.

programme.title: Within the frame - Season 1 - Nabis
programme.desc: Paul Sérusier spent his entire summer of 1888 painting with Paul Gauguin in Pont-Aven, Brittany. This master of colour gave invaluable advice to the young Sérusier, who was part of the new generation of painters known as the Post-Impressionists. The Impressionists favoured the visual sensation of the motif, but they had not broken with the illusionist rendering of nature.

Today, Raph will realize a fresco with his friends of the collective. He will be accompanied by several members including Sensei, who has been doing graffiti for 14 years. Let's see what they will realize.

programme.title: Museum stories - Season 1 - The Petit Palais
programme.desc: Since the beginning of its history, the Petit Palais has been imagined to highlight masterpieces of art. It is a true setting that magnifies creation in all its forms. Its extraordinary collection allows it to offer visitors a journey through the ages, confronting the great artists and the creative genius of all time, and thus breaking down the ages barrier.

programme.title: Museum Tour - Season 1 - The dawn of pop art - In the eye of Fernand Léger
programme.sub-title: The dawn of pop art - In the eye of Fernand Léger
programme.desc: Fernand Léger combines modernity and dynamism in his works. To exhibit his art, he has a museum dedicated to him in Biot. Let's have a look at the impressive collection of this museum, surrounded by a superb park laid out by Henri Fisch. You will be able to discover the artist, he was at the same time a painter, a ceramist, a sculptor, a draughtsman, a creator of tapestries and stained glass. Through the various periods leading him from post impressionism to pop art through cubism, the artist asserts himself as one of the most prolific and original artists of the 20th century.

programme.title: Art investigation - Season 1 - Etruscan Jar
programme.desc: We investigate on an exceptional vase produced at the Sèvres Manufactory in 1810. In the form of an Etruscan scroll, it celebrates the entry into Paris of works destined for the Napoleon Museum. What is this little-known historical event, which took place in 1798? And what is the hidden meaning of the painting and the decorations that adorn it? This documentary traces the history of the production of this extraordinary piece, its inspiration drawn from antiquity, but also investigates the event it recounts: Napoleon's spoliation of Italian collections, at a time when criticism was already being voiced about the movement of works of art in times of war. When the Empire fell, the director of the Manufacture had to use subterfuge to save the vase from destruction.

programme.title: Travelers - Season 1 - Geneva
programme.desc: Today, Travelers takes you to Geneva in Switzerland, the country of watches, chocolate, and fondue, but also of museums. We will start our visit with the old town. We will visit the ethnography museum of Geneva, the Namco museum of contemporary art. We will also try the real Swiss cheese fondue.

programme.title: Painting the Holy Land - Season 1 - In Search of Mary
programme.desc: Lachlan Goudie traces the story of Mary through the gospels with a personal question: why is the life of the Mother of God barely described in the Bible, but so well-represented in art? Lachlan looks at her role in the story of the Resurrection and the subsequent events up to Pentecost, fifty days after Easter.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc: Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy). - Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: La Bodega
programme.desc: "La Bodega" is your auditory journey into the heart of a vibrant Latin bodega, where the pulse of the neighborhood meets the rhythm of the streets. Featuring an eclectic mix of sounds, from the timeless classics of Marc Anthony and Romeo Santos to the infectious beats of Yailin La Mas Viral and more, this playlist captures the essence of community and culture. Whether you're grabbing your morning cafecito or browsing the aisles for your favorite snacks, let the music of "La Bodega" transport you to the lively streets of Latin America with every beat.

programme.title: Otra Vaina
programme.desc: "Otra Vaina" is your gateway to the unconventional, featuring music that breaks the mold and defies expectations. With tracks from boundary-pushing artists like Bad Bunny, Camilo, Karol G, and more, this playlist offers a refreshing departure from the mainstream. From experimental sounds to bold artistic statements, each song dares to be different, inviting listeners on a journey of musical exploration and discovery. Whether you're seeking innovation or simply craving something new, "Otra Vaina" promises to challenge your perceptions and ignite your imagination with its eclectic selection of out-of-the-box tunes.

programme.title: Freestyles
programme.desc: "Freestyles" is your gateway to the most captivating and raw expressions of lyrical prowess showcased by top artists on the internet. Featuring mind-blowing performances from talents like Bizarrap, Shakira, Messiah, and more, this playlist celebrates the art of improvisation and creativity in its purest form. Each video is a testament to the artist's skill and ingenuity, offering viewers an exhilarating glimpse into the world of spontaneous musical brilliance. Get ready to be mesmerized by the electrifying energy and unmatched talent displayed in the world of freestyles.

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: "House Party" is the ultimate soundtrack for your next bash, featuring the hottest tunes that set the vibe for an unforgettable night of revelry. With tracks from powerhouse artists like Daddy Yankee, El Alfa, Karol G, and more, this playlist captures the energy and excitement of a bustling house party. From reggaeton anthems to infectious beats, each song promises to keep the dance floor packed and the spirits high. Get ready to turn up the volume and let the music ignite the party atmosphere like never before!

programme.title: Best of:
programme.desc: Best of Bad Bunny is the ultimate compilation of Bad Bunny's most iconic music videos, showcasing his unparalleled talent and groundbreaking style. From chart-topping hits to fan-favorite anthems, each video offers a glimpse into the vibrant world of one of Latin music's biggest stars. Whether you're a die-hard fan or a newcomer to his music, this playlist is your definitive guide to the best of Bad Bunny. Get ready to immerse yourself in his mesmerizing visuals and infectious beats as you experience the brilliance of Bad Bunny.

programme.title: El Discovery
programme.desc: "El Discovery" playlist is your gateway to uncovering the latest tunes and emerging artists in the Latin music scene. Featuring powerhouse talents like Peso Pluma, Maria Becerra, Quevedo, and more, each track is a vibrant exploration of diverse genres and styles. From infectious beats to soul-stirring melodies, immerse yourself in this curated collection and embark on a journey of musical discovery like never before. Whether you're a seasoned aficionado or a newcomer, "El Discovery" promises to ignite your passion for fresh sounds and undiscovered talents.

programme.title: El Discovery
programme.desc: "El Discovery" playlist is your gateway to uncovering the latest tunes and emerging artists in the Latin music scene. Featuring powerhouse talents like Peso Pluma, Maria Becerra, Quevedo, and more, each track is a vibrant exploration of diverse genres and styles. From infectious beats to soul-stirring melodies, immerse yourself in this curated collection and embark on a journey of musical discovery like never before. Whether you're a seasoned aficionado or a newcomer, "El Discovery" promises to ignite your passion for fresh sounds and undiscovered talents.

programme.title: El Pulse
programme.desc: "El Pulse" is your go-to destination for the hottest chart-topping hits, curated to keep your pulse racing and your playlist on fire. Featuring chart-toppers from sensational artists like Feid, Bad Bunny, Karol G, and more, each track is a testament to the electrifying energy of the top charts. Whether you're into reggaeton, Latin pop, or urban beats, "El Pulse" delivers the ultimate collection of must-hear tunes that dominate the airwaves and keep listeners hooked. Tune in and let the pulse of the music drive your rhythm!

programme.title: La Grasa
programme.desc: "La Grasa" is the ultimate urban playlist, curated for those who thrive on the pulse of the streets. Featuring the hottest tracks favored by the urban crowd, this collection boasts electrifying beats and raw, unapologetic lyrics. With artists like Eladio Carrion, Yovngchimi, Tokischa, and more leading the charge, each song captures the essence of city life and the vibrant energy of its people. Whether you're hitting the streets or vibing with friends, "La Grasa" delivers the soundtrack for urban living at its finest.

programme.title: Viva La Raza
programme.desc: "Viva La Raza" celebrates the rich tapestry of Mexican music with a dynamic blend of chart-topping hits and beloved classics. From the infectious rhythms of Peso Pluma and Fuerza Regida to the soulful melodies of Carin Leon and more, this playlist is a vibrant tribute to the diverse sounds of Mexican music. Whether you're drawn to regional Mexican genres like corridos and banda or contemporary pop and urbano, "Viva La Raza" promises to immerse you in the passionate spirit and cultural heritage of Mexico through its electrifying tunes.

programme.title: Viva La Raza
programme.desc: "Viva La Raza" celebrates the rich tapestry of Mexican music with a dynamic blend of chart-topping hits and beloved classics. From the infectious rhythms of Peso Pluma and Fuerza Regida to the soulful melodies of Carin Leon and more, this playlist is a vibrant tribute to the diverse sounds of Mexican music. Whether you're drawn to regional Mexican genres like corridos and banda or contemporary pop and urbano, "Viva La Raza" promises to immerse you in the passionate spirit and cultural heritage of Mexico through its electrifying tunes.

programme.title: Discotek!
programme.desc: "Discotek" is your ultimate party playlist, filled with the pulsating beats and electrifying rhythms that dominate the dance floors of discotecas worldwide. Featuring chart-toppers and club anthems from artists like Anuel AA, Bad Bunny, Karol G, and more, each track is a sonic invitation to lose yourself in the vibrant energy of the night. From reggaeton to Latin pop, this curated collection ensures non-stop grooves and unforgettable moments on the dance floor. Get ready to turn up the volume and let the music move you in "Discotek"!

programme.title: La Grasa
programme.desc: "La Grasa" is the ultimate urban playlist, curated for those who thrive on the pulse of the streets. Featuring the hottest tracks favored by the urban crowd, this collection boasts electrifying beats and raw, unapologetic lyrics. With artists like Eladio Carrion, Yovngchimi, Tokischa, and more leading the charge, each song captures the essence of city life and the vibrant energy of its people. Whether you're hitting the streets or vibing with friends, "La Grasa" delivers the soundtrack for urban living at its finest.

programme.title: Otra Vaina
programme.desc: "Otra Vaina" is your gateway to the unconventional, featuring music that breaks the mold and defies expectations. With tracks from boundary-pushing artists like Bad Bunny, Camilo, Karol G, and more, this playlist offers a refreshing departure from the mainstream. From experimental sounds to bold artistic statements, each song dares to be different, inviting listeners on a journey of musical exploration and discovery. Whether you're seeking innovation or simply craving something new, "Otra Vaina" promises to challenge your perceptions and ignite your imagination with its eclectic selection of out-of-the-box tunes.

programme.title: Viva La Raza
programme.desc: "Viva La Raza" celebrates the rich tapestry of Mexican music with a dynamic blend of chart-topping hits and beloved classics. From the infectious rhythms of Peso Pluma and Fuerza Regida to the soulful melodies of Carin Leon and more, this playlist is a vibrant tribute to the diverse sounds of Mexican music. Whether you're drawn to regional Mexican genres like corridos and banda or contemporary pop and urbano, "Viva La Raza" promises to immerse you in the passionate spirit and cultural heritage of Mexico through its electrifying tunes.

programme.title: El Discovery
programme.desc: "El Discovery" playlist is your gateway to uncovering the latest tunes and emerging artists in the Latin music scene. Featuring powerhouse talents like Peso Pluma, Maria Becerra, Quevedo, and more, each track is a vibrant exploration of diverse genres and styles. From infectious beats to soul-stirring melodies, immerse yourself in this curated collection and embark on a journey of musical discovery like never before. Whether you're a seasoned aficionado or a newcomer, "El Discovery" promises to ignite your passion for fresh sounds and undiscovered talents.

programme.title: La Bodega
programme.desc: "La Bodega" is your auditory journey into the heart of a vibrant Latin bodega, where the pulse of the neighborhood meets the rhythm of the streets. Featuring an eclectic mix of sounds, from the timeless classics of Marc Anthony and Romeo Santos to the infectious beats of Yailin La Mas Viral and more, this playlist captures the essence of community and culture. Whether you're grabbing your morning cafecito or browsing the aisles for your favorite snacks, let the music of "La Bodega" transport you to the lively streets of Latin America with every beat.

programme.title: ENCORE: The 2024 Gemini Boat Race
programme.desc: The Boat Race is an annual event between crews from the University of Oxford and the University of Cambridge. The Men’s Boat Race was first raced in 1829 and is now one of the world’s oldest and most famous amateur sporting events. The Women’s Boat Race first took place in 1927. For every student athlete in one of the eight crews competing, being part of The Boat Race is an unrivalled educational and athletic experience.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.sub-title: WPT Foxwoods World Poker Finals - Part 2
programme.desc: Es un juego de dos en dos póker en Foxwoods, ya que un par de representantes muy talentosos de la nueva generación de jugadores se enfrentan a dos antiguos jugadores de Texas en la mesa final de las Finales de Foxwoods World Poker.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.sub-title: WPT Foxwoods World Poker Finals - Part 3
programme.desc: Una tabla final de WPT épica se reduce a dos jugadores de Texas en Soheil Shamseddin y Cornel Cimpan versus una pistola joven en el intrépido Matt Stout.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.sub-title: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic - Part 1
programme.desc: Cada año, el Cinco Diamond World Poker Classic exhibe a los mejores jugadores de póker en el negocio y la octava temporada no es una excepción ya que el campeón mundial Scotty Nguyen encabeza una final temeradamente talentosa.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.sub-title: WPT Five Diamond World Poker Classic - Part 2
programme.desc: Recién salido de su segundo lugar en Bellagio a principios de la temporada, Faraz "The Wathy" Jaka está de vuelta en Las Vegas y decidió no quedarse corto una vez más.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Un grupo de buenos chicos del sur y un abogado de la ciudad de Nueva York se enredan en un partido de póker de alto riesgo a orillas del Mississippi.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: La acción se calienta hacia el sur mientras el "Cowboy de Alabama" Hoyt Corkins busca escribir su nombre en los libros de registros al mudar su segundo título de WPT de carrera.

programme.title: WPT L.A. Poker Classic - Part 1
programme.desc: En Los Ángeles, el dinero significa poder y hay mucho poder en juego en la mesa final del clásico de póker de Los Ángeles, ya que el primer y segundo lugar ganan más de $ 1,000,000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: El torneo WPT más grande del año se reduce a su último cuatro y la acción no se detiene desde la primera mano hasta la última.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: La hermosa estrella de televisión de realidad Trishelle Cannatella ilumina esta fiesta de póker invitacional, pero sus oponentes saben que su belleza viene con cerebros y más que una pequeña apuesta.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: El WPT Invitational se ha reducido a solo cuatro jugadores y la hermosa estrella del reality show Trishelle Cannatella está lista para apagar a sus oponentes con un poco de realidad propia.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: El autoproclamado "El mejor jugador de póker del mundo", Phil Hellmuth, hace otra aparición en la etapa de WPT en su carrera en su carrera en su carrera por el único título que lo ha eludido: "Campeón de WPT".

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Hablando rápido e incluso más rápido jugando a Andy Seth comienza la noche en San José California con el liderazgo de Chip y solo cuatro jugadores lejos de su primer título de WPT.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Este casino de Hollywood podría no estar en California, pero esta mesa final de WPT tiene mucho poder estelar y una historia digna de un guión de Hollywood.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Las tensiones son altas en el casino de Hollywood cuando Carlos "The Matador" Mortensen se encuentra a solo dos jugadores de poseer casi todos los récord en los libros de registros de WPT.
